   30227             :    { (char *)"Feature_SetGeometryDirectly", _wrap_Feature_SetGeometryDirectly, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   30228             :     "Feature_SetGeometryDirectly(Feature self, Geometry geom) -> OGRErr\n"
   30229             :     "\n"
   30230             :     "OGRErr\n"
   30231             :     "OGR_F_SetGeometryDirectly(OGRFeatureH hFeat, OGRGeometryH hGeom)\n"
   30232             :     "\n"
   30233             :     "Set feature geometry.\n"
   30234             :     "\n"
   30235             :     "This function updates the features geometry, and operate exactly as\n"
   30236             :     "SetGeometry(), except that this function assumes ownership of the\n"
   30237             :     "passed geometry (even in case of failure of that function).\n"
   30238             :     "\n"
   30239             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method\n"
   30240             :     "OGRFeature::SetGeometryDirectly.\n"
   30241             :     "\n"
   30242             :     "This method has only an effect on the in-memory feature object. If\n"
   30243             :     "this object comes from a layer and the modifications must be\n"
   30244             :     "serialized back to the datasource, OGR_L_SetFeature() must be used\n"
   30245             :     "afterwards. Or if this is a new feature, OGR_L_CreateFeature() must be\n"
   30246             :     "used afterwards.\n"
   30247             :     "\n"
   30248             :     "Parameters:\n"
   30249             :     "-----------\n"
   30250             :     "\n"
   30251             :     "hFeat:  handle to the feature on which to apply the geometry.\n"
   30252             :     "\n"
   30253             :     "hGeom:  handle to the new geometry to apply to feature.\n"
   30254             :     "\n"
   30255             :     "OGRERR_NONE if successful, or OGR_UNSUPPORTED_GEOMETRY_TYPE if the\n"
   30256             :     "geometry type is illegal for the OGRFeatureDefn (checking not yet\n"
   30257             :     "implemented). \n"
   30258             :     ""},
   30259             :    { (char *)"Feature_GetGeometryRef", _wrap_Feature_GetGeometryRef, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   30260             :     "Feature_GetGeometryRef(Feature self) -> Geometry\n"
   30261             :     "\n"
   30262             :     "OGRGeometryH\n"
   30263             :     "OGR_F_GetGeometryRef(OGRFeatureH hFeat)\n"
   30264             :     "\n"
   30265             :     "Fetch an handle to feature geometry.\n"
   30266             :     "\n"
   30267             :     "This function is essentially the same as the C++ method\n"
   30268             :     "OGRFeature::GetGeometryRef() (the only difference is that this C\n"
   30269             :     "function honours OGRGetNonLinearGeometriesEnabledFlag())\n"
   30270             :     "\n"
   30271             :     "Parameters:\n"
   30272             :     "-----------\n"
   30273             :     "\n"
   30274             :     "hFeat:  handle to the feature to get geometry from.\n"
   30275             :     "\n"
   30276             :     "an handle to internal feature geometry. This object should not be\n"
   30277             :     "modified. \n"
   30278             :     ""},
   30279             :    { (char *)"Feature_SetGeomField", _wrap_Feature_SetGeomField, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   30280             :     "SetGeomField(int iField, Geometry geom) -> OGRErr\n"
   30281             :     "Feature_SetGeomField(Feature self, char const * field_name, Geometry geom) -> OGRErr\n"
   30282             :     "\n"
   30283             :     "OGRErr\n"
   30284             :     "OGR_F_SetGeomField(OGRFeatureH hFeat, int iField, OGRGeometryH hGeom)\n"
   30285             :     "\n"
   30286             :     "Set feature geometry of a specified geometry field.\n"
   30287             :     "\n"
   30288             :     "This function updates the features geometry, and operate exactly as\n"
   30289             :     "SetGeometryDirectly(), except that this function does not assume\n"
   30290             :     "ownership of the passed geometry, but instead makes a copy of it.\n"
   30291             :     "\n"
   30292             :     "This function is the same as the C++ OGRFeature::SetGeomField().\n"
   30293             :     "\n"
   30294             :     "Parameters:\n"
   30295             :     "-----------\n"
   30296             :     "\n"
   30297             :     "hFeat:  handle to the feature on which new geometry is applied to.\n"
   30298             :     "\n"
   30299             :     "iField:  geometry field to set.\n"
   30300             :     "\n"
   30301             :     "hGeom:  handle to the new geometry to apply to feature.\n"
   30302             :     "\n"
   30303             :     "OGRERR_NONE if successful, or OGR_UNSUPPORTED_GEOMETRY_TYPE if the\n"
   30304             :     "geometry type is illegal for the OGRFeatureDefn (checking not yet\n"
   30305             :     "implemented). \n"
   30306             :     ""},
   30307             :    { (char *)"Feature_SetGeomFieldDirectly", _wrap_Feature_SetGeomFieldDirectly, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   30308             :     "SetGeomFieldDirectly(int iField, Geometry geom) -> OGRErr\n"
   30309             :     "Feature_SetGeomFieldDirectly(Feature self, char const * field_name, Geometry geom) -> OGRErr\n"
   30310             :     "\n"
   30311             :     "OGRErr\n"
   30312             :     "OGR_F_SetGeomFieldDirectly(OGRFeatureH hFeat, int iField, OGRGeometryH\n"
   30313             :     "hGeom)\n"
   30314             :     "\n"
   30315             :     "Set feature geometry of a specified geometry field.\n"
   30316             :     "\n"
   30317             :     "This function updates the features geometry, and operate exactly as\n"
   30318             :     "SetGeomField(), except that this function assumes ownership of the\n"
   30319             :     "passed geometry (even in case of failure of that function).\n"
   30320             :     "\n"
   30321             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method\n"
   30322             :     "OGRFeature::SetGeomFieldDirectly.\n"
   30323             :     "\n"
   30324             :     "Parameters:\n"
   30325             :     "-----------\n"
   30326             :     "\n"
   30327             :     "hFeat:  handle to the feature on which to apply the geometry.\n"
   30328             :     "\n"
   30329             :     "iField:  geometry field to set.\n"
   30330             :     "\n"
   30331             :     "hGeom:  handle to the new geometry to apply to feature.\n"
   30332             :     "\n"
   30333             :     "OGRERR_NONE if successful, or OGRERR_FAILURE if the index is invalid,\n"
   30334             :     "or OGR_UNSUPPORTED_GEOMETRY_TYPE if the geometry type is illegal for\n"
   30335             :     "the OGRFeatureDefn (checking not yet implemented).\n"
   30336             :     "\n"
   30337             :     "GDAL 1.11 \n"
   30338             :     ""},
   30339             :    { (char *)"Feature_GetGeomFieldRef", _wrap_Feature_GetGeomFieldRef, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   30340             :     "GetGeomFieldRef(int iField) -> Geometry\n"
   30341             :     "Feature_GetGeomFieldRef(Feature self, char const * field_name) -> Geometry\n"
   30342             :     "\n"
   30343             :     "OGRGeometryH\n"
   30344             :     "OGR_F_GetGeomFieldRef(OGRFeatureH hFeat, int iField)\n"
   30345             :     "\n"
   30346             :     "Fetch an handle to feature geometry.\n"
   30347             :     "\n"
   30348             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method\n"
   30349             :     "OGRFeature::GetGeomFieldRef().\n"
   30350             :     "\n"
   30351             :     "Parameters:\n"
   30352             :     "-----------\n"
   30353             :     "\n"
   30354             :     "hFeat:  handle to the feature to get geometry from.\n"
   30355             :     "\n"
   30356             :     "iField:  geometry field to get.\n"
   30357             :     "\n"
   30358             :     "an handle to internal feature geometry. This object should not be\n"
   30359             :     "modified.\n"
   30360             :     "\n"
   30361             :     "GDAL 1.11 \n"
   30362             :     ""},
   30363             :    { (char *)"Feature_Clone", _wrap_Feature_Clone, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   30364             :     "Feature_Clone(Feature self) -> Feature\n"
   30365             :     "\n"
   30366             :     "OGRFeatureH OGR_F_Clone(OGRFeatureH\n"
   30367             :     "hFeat)\n"
   30368             :     "\n"
   30369             :     "Duplicate feature.\n"
   30370             :     "\n"
   30371             :     "The newly created feature is owned by the caller, and will have its\n"
   30372             :     "own reference to the OGRFeatureDefn.\n"
   30373             :     "\n"
   30374             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method OGRFeature::Clone().\n"
   30375             :     "\n"
   30376             :     "Parameters:\n"
   30377             :     "-----------\n"
   30378             :     "\n"
   30379             :     "hFeat:  handle to the feature to clone.\n"
   30380             :     "\n"
   30381             :     "an handle to the new feature, exactly matching this feature. \n"
   30382             :     ""},
   30383             :    { (char *)"Feature_Equal", _wrap_Feature_Equal, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   30384             :     "Feature_Equal(Feature self, Feature feature) -> bool\n"
   30385             :     "\n"
   30386             :     "int OGR_F_Equal(OGRFeatureH hFeat,\n"
   30387             :     "OGRFeatureH hOtherFeat)\n"
   30388             :     "\n"
   30389             :     "Test if two features are the same.\n"
   30390             :     "\n"
   30391             :     "Two features are considered equal if the share them (handle equality)\n"
   30392             :     "same OGRFeatureDefn, have the same field values, and the same geometry\n"
   30393             :     "(as tested by OGR_G_Equal()) as well as the same feature id.\n"
   30394             :     "\n"
   30395             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method OGRFeature::Equal().\n"
   30396             :     "\n"
   30397             :     "Parameters:\n"
   30398             :     "-----------\n"
   30399             :     "\n"
   30400             :     "hFeat:  handle to one of the feature.\n"
   30401             :     "\n"
   30402             :     "hOtherFeat:  handle to the other feature to test this one against.\n"
   30403             :     "\n"
   30404             :     "TRUE if they are equal, otherwise FALSE. \n"
   30405             :     ""},
   30406             :    { (char *)"Feature_GetFieldCount", _wrap_Feature_GetFieldCount, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   30407             :     "Feature_GetFieldCount(Feature self) -> int\n"
   30408             :     "\n"
   30409             :     "int\n"
   30410             :     "OGR_F_GetFieldCount(OGRFeatureH hFeat)\n"
   30411             :     "\n"
   30412             :     "Fetch number of fields on this feature This will always be the same as\n"
   30413             :     "the field count for the OGRFeatureDefn.\n"
   30414             :     "\n"
   30415             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method\n"
   30416             :     "OGRFeature::GetFieldCount().\n"
   30417             :     "\n"
   30418             :     "Parameters:\n"
   30419             :     "-----------\n"
   30420             :     "\n"
   30421             :     "hFeat:  handle to the feature to get the fields count from.\n"
   30422             :     "\n"
   30423             :     "count of fields. \n"
   30424             :     ""},
   30425             :    { (char *)"Feature_GetFieldDefnRef", _wrap_Feature_GetFieldDefnRef, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   30426             :     "GetFieldDefnRef(int id) -> FieldDefn\n"
   30427             :     "Feature_GetFieldDefnRef(Feature self, char const * field_name) -> FieldDefn\n"
   30428             :     "\n"
   30429             :     "OGRFieldDefnH\n"
   30430             :     "OGR_F_GetFieldDefnRef(OGRFeatureH hFeat, int i)\n"
   30431             :     "\n"
   30432             :     "Fetch definition for this field.\n"
   30433             :     "\n"
   30434             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method\n"
   30435             :     "OGRFeature::GetFieldDefnRef().\n"
   30436             :     "\n"
   30437             :     "Parameters:\n"
   30438             :     "-----------\n"
   30439             :     "\n"
   30440             :     "hFeat:  handle to the feature on which the field is found.\n"
   30441             :     "\n"
   30442             :     "i:  the field to fetch, from 0 to GetFieldCount()-1.\n"
   30443             :     "\n"
   30444             :     "an handle to the field definition (from the OGRFeatureDefn). This is\n"
   30445             :     "an internal reference, and should not be deleted or modified. \n"
   30446             :     ""},
   30447             :    { (char *)"Feature_GetGeomFieldCount", _wrap_Feature_GetGeomFieldCount, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   30448             :     "Feature_GetGeomFieldCount(Feature self) -> int\n"
   30449             :     "\n"
   30450             :     "int\n"
   30451             :     "OGR_F_GetGeomFieldCount(OGRFeatureH hFeat)\n"
   30452             :     "\n"
   30453             :     "Fetch number of geometry fields on this feature This will always be\n"
   30454             :     "the same as the geometry field count for the OGRFeatureDefn.\n"
   30455             :     "\n"
   30456             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method\n"
   30457             :     "OGRFeature::GetGeomFieldCount().\n"
   30458             :     "\n"
   30459             :     "Parameters:\n"
   30460             :     "-----------\n"
   30461             :     "\n"
   30462             :     "hFeat:  handle to the feature to get the geometry fields count from.\n"
   30463             :     "\n"
   30464             :     "count of geometry fields.\n"
   30465             :     "\n"
   30466             :     "GDAL 1.11 \n"
   30467             :     ""},
   30468             :    { (char *)"Feature_GetGeomFieldDefnRef", _wrap_Feature_GetGeomFieldDefnRef, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   30469             :     "GetGeomFieldDefnRef(int id) -> GeomFieldDefn\n"
   30470             :     "Feature_GetGeomFieldDefnRef(Feature self, char const * field_name) -> GeomFieldDefn\n"
   30471             :     "\n"
   30472             :     "OGRGeomFieldDefnH\n"
   30473             :     "OGR_F_GetGeomFieldDefnRef(OGRFeatureH hFeat, int i)\n"
   30474             :     "\n"
   30475             :     "Fetch definition for this geometry field.\n"
   30476             :     "\n"
   30477             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method\n"
   30478             :     "OGRFeature::GetGeomFieldDefnRef().\n"
   30479             :     "\n"
   30480             :     "Parameters:\n"
   30481             :     "-----------\n"
   30482             :     "\n"
   30483             :     "hFeat:  handle to the feature on which the field is found.\n"
   30484             :     "\n"
   30485             :     "i:  the field to fetch, from 0 to GetGeomFieldCount()-1.\n"
   30486             :     "\n"
   30487             :     "an handle to the field definition (from the OGRFeatureDefn). This is\n"
   30488             :     "an internal reference, and should not be deleted or modified.\n"
   30489             :     "\n"
   30490             :     "GDAL 1.11 \n"
   30491             :     ""},
   30492             :    { (char *)"Feature_GetFieldAsString", _wrap_Feature_GetFieldAsString, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   30493             :     "GetFieldAsString(int id) -> char const\n"
   30494             :     "Feature_GetFieldAsString(Feature self, char const * field_name) -> char const *\n"
   30495             :     "\n"
   30496             :     "const char*\n"
   30497             :     "OGR_F_GetFieldAsString(OGRFeatureH hFeat, int iField)\n"
   30498             :     "\n"
   30499             :     "Fetch field value as a string.\n"
   30500             :     "\n"
   30501             :     "OFTReal and OFTInteger fields will be translated to string using\n"
   30502             :     "sprintf(), but not necessarily using the established formatting rules.\n"
   30503             :     "Other field types, or errors will result in a return value of zero.\n"
   30504             :     "\n"
   30505             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method\n"
   30506             :     "OGRFeature::GetFieldAsString().\n"
   30507             :     "\n"
   30508             :     "Parameters:\n"
   30509             :     "-----------\n"
   30510             :     "\n"
   30511             :     "hFeat:  handle to the feature that owned the field.\n"
   30512             :     "\n"
   30513             :     "iField:  the field to fetch, from 0 to GetFieldCount()-1.\n"
   30514             :     "\n"
   30515             :     "the field value. This string is internal, and should not be modified,\n"
   30516             :     "or freed. Its lifetime may be very brief. \n"
   30517             :     ""},
   30518             :    { (char *)"Feature_GetFieldAsInteger", _wrap_Feature_GetFieldAsInteger, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   30519             :     "GetFieldAsInteger(int id) -> int\n"
   30520             :     "Feature_GetFieldAsInteger(Feature self, char const * field_name) -> int\n"
   30521             :     "\n"
   30522             :     "int\n"
   30523             :     "OGR_F_GetFieldAsInteger(OGRFeatureH hFeat, int iField)\n"
   30524             :     "\n"
   30525             :     "Fetch field value as integer.\n"
   30526             :     "\n"
   30527             :     "OFTString features will be translated using atoi(). OFTReal fields\n"
   30528             :     "will be cast to integer. Other field types, or errors will result in a\n"
   30529             :     "return value of zero.\n"
   30530             :     "\n"
   30531             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method\n"
   30532             :     "OGRFeature::GetFieldAsInteger().\n"
   30533             :     "\n"
   30534             :     "Parameters:\n"
   30535             :     "-----------\n"
   30536             :     "\n"
   30537             :     "hFeat:  handle to the feature that owned the field.\n"
   30538             :     "\n"
   30539             :     "iField:  the field to fetch, from 0 to GetFieldCount()-1.\n"
   30540             :     "\n"
   30541             :     "the field value. \n"
   30542             :     ""},
   30543             :    { (char *)"Feature_GetFieldAsInteger64", _wrap_Feature_GetFieldAsInteger64, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   30544             :     "GetFieldAsInteger64(int id) -> GIntBig\n"
   30545             :     "Feature_GetFieldAsInteger64(Feature self, char const * field_name) -> GIntBig\n"
   30546             :     "\n"
   30547             :     "GIntBig\n"
   30548             :     "OGR_F_GetFieldAsInteger64(OGRFeatureH hFeat, int iField)\n"
   30549             :     "\n"
   30550             :     "Fetch field value as integer 64 bit.\n"
   30551             :     "\n"
   30552             :     "OFTInteger are promoted to 64 bit. OFTString features will be\n"
   30553             :     "translated using CPLAtoGIntBig(). OFTReal fields will be cast to\n"
   30554             :     "integer. Other field types, or errors will result in a return value of\n"
   30555             :     "zero.\n"
   30556             :     "\n"
   30557             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method\n"
   30558             :     "OGRFeature::GetFieldAsInteger64().\n"
   30559             :     "\n"
   30560             :     "Parameters:\n"
   30561             :     "-----------\n"
   30562             :     "\n"
   30563             :     "hFeat:  handle to the feature that owned the field.\n"
   30564             :     "\n"
   30565             :     "iField:  the field to fetch, from 0 to GetFieldCount()-1.\n"
   30566             :     "\n"
   30567             :     "the field value.\n"
   30568             :     "\n"
   30569             :     "GDAL 2.0 \n"
   30570             :     ""},
   30571             :    { (char *)"Feature_GetFieldAsDouble", _wrap_Feature_GetFieldAsDouble, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   30572             :     "GetFieldAsDouble(int id) -> double\n"
   30573             :     "Feature_GetFieldAsDouble(Feature self, char const * field_name) -> double\n"
   30574             :     "\n"
   30575             :     "double\n"
   30576             :     "OGR_F_GetFieldAsDouble(OGRFeatureH hFeat, int iField)\n"
   30577             :     "\n"
   30578             :     "Fetch field value as a double.\n"
   30579             :     "\n"
   30580             :     "OFTString features will be translated using CPLAtof(). OFTInteger\n"
   30581             :     "fields will be cast to double. Other field types, or errors will\n"
   30582             :     "result in a return value of zero.\n"
   30583             :     "\n"
   30584             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method\n"
   30585             :     "OGRFeature::GetFieldAsDouble().\n"
   30586             :     "\n"
   30587             :     "Parameters:\n"
   30588             :     "-----------\n"
   30589             :     "\n"
   30590             :     "hFeat:  handle to the feature that owned the field.\n"
   30591             :     "\n"
   30592             :     "iField:  the field to fetch, from 0 to GetFieldCount()-1.\n"
   30593             :     "\n"
   30594             :     "the field value. \n"
   30595             :     ""},
   30596             :    { (char *)"Feature_GetFieldAsDateTime", _wrap_Feature_GetFieldAsDateTime, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   30597             :     "GetFieldAsDateTime(int id)\n"
   30598             :     "Feature_GetFieldAsDateTime(Feature self, char const * field_name)\n"
   30599             :     "\n"
   30600             :     "int\n"
   30601             :     "OGR_F_GetFieldAsDateTime(OGRFeatureH hFeat, int iField, int *pnYear,\n"
   30602             :     "int *pnMonth, int *pnDay, int *pnHour, int *pnMinute, int *pnSecond,\n"
   30603             :     "int *pnTZFlag)\n"
   30604             :     "\n"
   30605             :     "Fetch field value as date and time.\n"
   30606             :     "\n"
   30607             :     "Currently this method only works for OFTDate, OFTTime and OFTDateTime\n"
   30608             :     "fields.\n"
   30609             :     "\n"
   30610             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method\n"
   30611             :     "OGRFeature::GetFieldAsDateTime().\n"
   30612             :     "\n"
   30613             :     "Parameters:\n"
   30614             :     "-----------\n"
   30615             :     "\n"
   30616             :     "hFeat:  handle to the feature that owned the field.\n"
   30617             :     "\n"
   30618             :     "iField:  the field to fetch, from 0 to GetFieldCount()-1.\n"
   30619             :     "\n"
   30620             :     "pnYear:  (including century)\n"
   30621             :     "\n"
   30622             :     "pnMonth:  (1-12)\n"
   30623             :     "\n"
   30624             :     "pnDay:  (1-31)\n"
   30625             :     "\n"
   30626             :     "pnHour:  (0-23)\n"
   30627             :     "\n"
   30628             :     "pnMinute:  (0-59)\n"
   30629             :     "\n"
   30630             :     "pnSecond:  (0-59)\n"
   30631             :     "\n"
   30632             :     "pnTZFlag:  (0=unknown, 1=localtime, 100=GMT, see data model for\n"
   30633             :     "details)\n"
   30634             :     "\n"
   30635             :     "TRUE on success or FALSE on failure.\n"
   30636             :     "\n"
   30637             :     "See:  Use OGR_F_GetFieldAsDateTimeEx() for second with millisecond\n"
   30638             :     "accuracy. \n"
   30639             :     ""},
   30640             :    { (char *)"Feature_GetFieldAsIntegerList", _wrap_Feature_GetFieldAsIntegerList, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   30641             :     "GetFieldAsIntegerList(int id)\n"
   30642             :     "Feature_GetFieldAsIntegerList(Feature self, char const * field_name)\n"
   30643             :     "\n"
   30644             :     "const int*\n"
   30645             :     "OGR_F_GetFieldAsIntegerList(OGRFeatureH hFeat, int iField, int\n"
   30646             :     "*pnCount)\n"
   30647             :     "\n"
   30648             :     "Fetch field value as a list of integers.\n"
   30649             :     "\n"
   30650             :     "Currently this function only works for OFTIntegerList fields.\n"
   30651             :     "\n"
   30652             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method\n"
   30653             :     "OGRFeature::GetFieldAsIntegerList().\n"
   30654             :     "\n"
   30655             :     "Parameters:\n"
   30656             :     "-----------\n"
   30657             :     "\n"
   30658             :     "hFeat:  handle to the feature that owned the field.\n"
   30659             :     "\n"
   30660             :     "iField:  the field to fetch, from 0 to GetFieldCount()-1.\n"
   30661             :     "\n"
   30662             :     "pnCount:  an integer to put the list count (number of integers) into.\n"
   30663             :     "\n"
   30664             :     "the field value. This list is internal, and should not be modified, or\n"
   30665             :     "freed. Its lifetime may be very brief. If *pnCount is zero on return\n"
   30666             :     "the returned pointer may be NULL or non-NULL. \n"
   30667             :     ""},
   30668             :    { (char *)"Feature_GetFieldAsInteger64List", _wrap_Feature_GetFieldAsInteger64List, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   30669             :     "Feature_GetFieldAsInteger64List(Feature self, int id)\n"
   30670             :     "\n"
   30671             :     "const GIntBig*\n"
   30672             :     "OGR_F_GetFieldAsInteger64List(OGRFeatureH hFeat, int iField, int\n"
   30673             :     "*pnCount)\n"
   30674             :     "\n"
   30675             :     "Fetch field value as a list of 64 bit integers.\n"
   30676             :     "\n"
   30677             :     "Currently this function only works for OFTInteger64List fields.\n"
   30678             :     "\n"
   30679             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method\n"
   30680             :     "OGRFeature::GetFieldAsInteger64List().\n"
   30681             :     "\n"
   30682             :     "Parameters:\n"
   30683             :     "-----------\n"
   30684             :     "\n"
   30685             :     "hFeat:  handle to the feature that owned the field.\n"
   30686             :     "\n"
   30687             :     "iField:  the field to fetch, from 0 to GetFieldCount()-1.\n"
   30688             :     "\n"
   30689             :     "pnCount:  an integer to put the list count (number of integers) into.\n"
   30690             :     "\n"
   30691             :     "the field value. This list is internal, and should not be modified, or\n"
   30692             :     "freed. Its lifetime may be very brief. If *pnCount is zero on return\n"
   30693             :     "the returned pointer may be NULL or non-NULL.\n"
   30694             :     "\n"
   30695             :     "GDAL 2.0 \n"
   30696             :     ""},
   30697             :    { (char *)"Feature_GetFieldAsDoubleList", _wrap_Feature_GetFieldAsDoubleList, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   30698             :     "GetFieldAsDoubleList(int id)\n"
   30699             :     "Feature_GetFieldAsDoubleList(Feature self, char const * field_name)\n"
   30700             :     "\n"
   30701             :     "const double*\n"
   30702             :     "OGR_F_GetFieldAsDoubleList(OGRFeatureH hFeat, int iField, int\n"
   30703             :     "*pnCount)\n"
   30704             :     "\n"
   30705             :     "Fetch field value as a list of doubles.\n"
   30706             :     "\n"
   30707             :     "Currently this function only works for OFTRealList fields.\n"
   30708             :     "\n"
   30709             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method\n"
   30710             :     "OGRFeature::GetFieldAsDoubleList().\n"
   30711             :     "\n"
   30712             :     "Parameters:\n"
   30713             :     "-----------\n"
   30714             :     "\n"
   30715             :     "hFeat:  handle to the feature that owned the field.\n"
   30716             :     "\n"
   30717             :     "iField:  the field to fetch, from 0 to GetFieldCount()-1.\n"
   30718             :     "\n"
   30719             :     "pnCount:  an integer to put the list count (number of doubles) into.\n"
   30720             :     "\n"
   30721             :     "the field value. This list is internal, and should not be modified, or\n"
   30722             :     "freed. Its lifetime may be very brief. If *pnCount is zero on return\n"
   30723             :     "the returned pointer may be NULL or non-NULL. \n"
   30724             :     ""},
   30725             :    { (char *)"Feature_GetFieldAsStringList", _wrap_Feature_GetFieldAsStringList, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   30726             :     "Feature_GetFieldAsStringList(Feature self, int id) -> char **\n"
   30727             :     "\n"
   30728             :     "char**\n"
   30729             :     "OGR_F_GetFieldAsStringList(OGRFeatureH hFeat, int iField)\n"
   30730             :     "\n"
   30731             :     "Fetch field value as a list of strings.\n"
   30732             :     "\n"
   30733             :     "Currently this method only works for OFTStringList fields.\n"
   30734             :     "\n"
   30735             :     "The returned list is terminated by a NULL pointer. The number of\n"
   30736             :     "elements can also be calculated using CSLCount().\n"
   30737             :     "\n"
   30738             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method\n"
   30739             :     "OGRFeature::GetFieldAsStringList().\n"
   30740             :     "\n"
   30741             :     "Parameters:\n"
   30742             :     "-----------\n"
   30743             :     "\n"
   30744             :     "hFeat:  handle to the feature that owned the field.\n"
   30745             :     "\n"
   30746             :     "iField:  the field to fetch, from 0 to GetFieldCount()-1.\n"
   30747             :     "\n"
   30748             :     "the field value. This list is internal, and should not be modified, or\n"
   30749             :     "freed. Its lifetime may be very brief. \n"
   30750             :     ""},
   30751             :    { (char *)"Feature_GetFieldAsBinary", _wrap_Feature_GetFieldAsBinary, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   30752             :     "GetFieldAsBinary(int id) -> OGRErr\n"
   30753             :     "Feature_GetFieldAsBinary(Feature self, char const * field_name) -> OGRErr\n"
   30754             :     "\n"
   30755             :     "GByte*\n"
   30756             :     "OGR_F_GetFieldAsBinary(OGRFeatureH hFeat, int iField, int *pnBytes)\n"
   30757             :     "\n"
   30758             :     "Fetch field value as binary.\n"
   30759             :     "\n"
   30760             :     "This method only works for OFTBinary and OFTString fields.\n"
   30761             :     "\n"
   30762             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method\n"
   30763             :     "OGRFeature::GetFieldAsBinary().\n"
   30764             :     "\n"
   30765             :     "Parameters:\n"
   30766             :     "-----------\n"
   30767             :     "\n"
   30768             :     "hFeat:  handle to the feature that owned the field.\n"
   30769             :     "\n"
   30770             :     "iField:  the field to fetch, from 0 to GetFieldCount()-1.\n"
   30771             :     "\n"
   30772             :     "pnBytes:  location to place count of bytes returned.\n"
   30773             :     "\n"
   30774             :     "the field value. This list is internal, and should not be modified, or\n"
   30775             :     "freed. Its lifetime may be very brief. \n"
   30776             :     ""},
   30777             :    { (char *)"Feature_IsFieldSet", _wrap_Feature_IsFieldSet, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   30778             :     "IsFieldSet(int id) -> bool\n"
   30779             :     "Feature_IsFieldSet(Feature self, char const * field_name) -> bool\n"
   30780             :     "\n"
   30781             :     "int OGR_F_IsFieldSet(OGRFeatureH\n"
   30782             :     "hFeat, int iField)\n"
   30783             :     "\n"
   30784             :     "Test if a field has ever been assigned a value or not.\n"
   30785             :     "\n"
   30786             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method OGRFeature::IsFieldSet().\n"
   30787             :     "\n"
   30788             :     "Parameters:\n"
   30789             :     "-----------\n"
   30790             :     "\n"
   30791             :     "hFeat:  handle to the feature on which the field is.\n"
   30792             :     "\n"
   30793             :     "iField:  the field to test.\n"
   30794             :     "\n"
   30795             :     "TRUE if the field has been set, otherwise false. \n"
   30796             :     ""},
   30797             :    { (char *)"Feature_IsFieldNull", _wrap_Feature_IsFieldNull, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   30798             :     "IsFieldNull(int id) -> bool\n"
   30799             :     "Feature_IsFieldNull(Feature self, char const * field_name) -> bool\n"
   30800             :     "\n"
   30801             :     "int OGR_F_IsFieldNull(OGRFeatureH\n"
   30802             :     "hFeat, int iField)\n"
   30803             :     "\n"
   30804             :     "Test if a field is null.\n"
   30805             :     "\n"
   30806             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method OGRFeature::IsFieldNull().\n"
   30807             :     "\n"
   30808             :     "Parameters:\n"
   30809             :     "-----------\n"
   30810             :     "\n"
   30811             :     "hFeat:  handle to the feature on which the field is.\n"
   30812             :     "\n"
   30813             :     "iField:  the field to test.\n"
   30814             :     "\n"
   30815             :     "TRUE if the field is null, otherwise false.\n"
   30816             :     "\n"
   30817             :     "GDAL 2.2 \n"
   30818             :     ""},
   30819             :    { (char *)"Feature_IsFieldSetAndNotNull", _wrap_Feature_IsFieldSetAndNotNull, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   30820             :     "IsFieldSetAndNotNull(int id) -> bool\n"
   30821             :     "Feature_IsFieldSetAndNotNull(Feature self, char const * field_name) -> bool\n"
   30822             :     "\n"
   30823             :     "int\n"
   30824             :     "OGR_F_IsFieldSetAndNotNull(OGRFeatureH hFeat, int iField)\n"
   30825             :     "\n"
   30826             :     "Test if a field is set and not null.\n"
   30827             :     "\n"
   30828             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method\n"
   30829             :     "OGRFeature::IsFieldSetAndNotNull().\n"
   30830             :     "\n"
   30831             :     "Parameters:\n"
   30832             :     "-----------\n"
   30833             :     "\n"
   30834             :     "hFeat:  handle to the feature on which the field is.\n"
   30835             :     "\n"
   30836             :     "iField:  the field to test.\n"
   30837             :     "\n"
   30838             :     "TRUE if the field is set and not null, otherwise false.\n"
   30839             :     "\n"
   30840             :     "GDAL 2.2 \n"
   30841             :     ""},
   30842             :    { (char *)"Feature_GetFieldIndex", _wrap_Feature_GetFieldIndex, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   30843             :     "Feature_GetFieldIndex(Feature self, char const * field_name) -> int\n"
   30844             :     "\n"
   30845             :     "int\n"
   30846             :     "OGR_F_GetFieldIndex(OGRFeatureH hFeat, const char *pszName)\n"
   30847             :     "\n"
   30848             :     "Fetch the field index given field name.\n"
   30849             :     "\n"
   30850             :     "This is a cover for the OGRFeatureDefn::GetFieldIndex() method.\n"
   30851             :     "\n"
   30852             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method\n"
   30853             :     "OGRFeature::GetFieldIndex().\n"
   30854             :     "\n"
   30855             :     "Parameters:\n"
   30856             :     "-----------\n"
   30857             :     "\n"
   30858             :     "hFeat:  handle to the feature on which the field is found.\n"
   30859             :     "\n"
   30860             :     "pszName:  the name of the field to search for.\n"
   30861             :     "\n"
   30862             :     "the field index, or -1 if no matching field is found. \n"
   30863             :     ""},
   30864             :    { (char *)"Feature_GetGeomFieldIndex", _wrap_Feature_GetGeomFieldIndex, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   30865             :     "Feature_GetGeomFieldIndex(Feature self, char const * field_name) -> int\n"
   30866             :     "\n"
   30867             :     "int\n"
   30868             :     "OGR_F_GetGeomFieldIndex(OGRFeatureH hFeat, const char *pszName)\n"
   30869             :     "\n"
   30870             :     "Fetch the geometry field index given geometry field name.\n"
   30871             :     "\n"
   30872             :     "This is a cover for the OGRFeatureDefn::GetGeomFieldIndex() method.\n"
   30873             :     "\n"
   30874             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method\n"
   30875             :     "OGRFeature::GetGeomFieldIndex().\n"
   30876             :     "\n"
   30877             :     "Parameters:\n"
   30878             :     "-----------\n"
   30879             :     "\n"
   30880             :     "hFeat:  handle to the feature on which the geometry field is found.\n"
   30881             :     "\n"
   30882             :     "pszName:  the name of the geometry field to search for.\n"
   30883             :     "\n"
   30884             :     "the geometry field index, or -1 if no matching geometry field is\n"
   30885             :     "found.\n"
   30886             :     "\n"
   30887             :     "GDAL 1.11 \n"
   30888             :     ""},
   30889             :    { (char *)"Feature_GetFID", _wrap_Feature_GetFID, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   30890             :     "Feature_GetFID(Feature self) -> GIntBig\n"
   30891             :     "\n"
   30892             :     "GIntBig OGR_F_GetFID(OGRFeatureH\n"
   30893             :     "hFeat)\n"
   30894             :     "\n"
   30895             :     "Get feature identifier.\n"
   30896             :     "\n"
   30897             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method OGRFeature::GetFID().\n"
   30898             :     "Note: since GDAL 2.0, this method returns a GIntBig (previously a\n"
   30899             :     "long)\n"
   30900             :     "\n"
   30901             :     "Parameters:\n"
   30902             :     "-----------\n"
   30903             :     "\n"
   30904             :     "hFeat:  handle to the feature from which to get the feature\n"
   30905             :     "identifier.\n"
   30906             :     "\n"
   30907             :     "feature id or OGRNullFID if none has been assigned. \n"
   30908             :     ""},
   30909             :    { (char *)"Feature_SetFID", _wrap_Feature_SetFID, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   30910             :     "Feature_SetFID(Feature self, GIntBig fid) -> OGRErr\n"
   30911             :     "\n"
   30912             :     "OGRErr OGR_F_SetFID(OGRFeatureH hFeat,\n"
   30913             :     "GIntBig nFID)\n"
   30914             :     "\n"
   30915             :     "Set the feature identifier.\n"
   30916             :     "\n"
   30917             :     "For specific types of features this operation may fail on illegal\n"
   30918             :     "features ids. Generally it always succeeds. Feature ids should be\n"
   30919             :     "greater than or equal to zero, with the exception of OGRNullFID (-1)\n"
   30920             :     "indicating that the feature id is unknown.\n"
   30921             :     "\n"
   30922             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method OGRFeature::SetFID().\n"
   30923             :     "\n"
   30924             :     "Parameters:\n"
   30925             :     "-----------\n"
   30926             :     "\n"
   30927             :     "hFeat:  handle to the feature to set the feature id to.\n"
   30928             :     "\n"
   30929             :     "nFID:  the new feature identifier value to assign.\n"
   30930             :     "\n"
   30931             :     "On success OGRERR_NONE, or on failure some other value. \n"
   30932             :     ""},
   30933             :    { (char *)"Feature_DumpReadable", _wrap_Feature_DumpReadable, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   30934             :     "Feature_DumpReadable(Feature self)\n"
   30935             :     "\n"
   30936             :     "void\n"
   30937             :     "OGR_F_DumpReadable(OGRFeatureH hFeat, FILE *fpOut)\n"
   30938             :     "\n"
   30939             :     "Dump this feature in a human readable form.\n"
   30940             :     "\n"
   30941             :     "This dumps the attributes, and geometry; however, it doesn't\n"
   30942             :     "definition information (other than field types and names), nor does it\n"
   30943             :     "report the geometry spatial reference system.\n"
   30944             :     "\n"
   30945             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method\n"
   30946             :     "OGRFeature::DumpReadable().\n"
   30947             :     "\n"
   30948             :     "Parameters:\n"
   30949             :     "-----------\n"
   30950             :     "\n"
   30951             :     "hFeat:  handle to the feature to dump.\n"
   30952             :     "\n"
   30953             :     "fpOut:  the stream to write to, such as strout. \n"
   30954             :     ""},
   30955             :    { (char *)"Feature_UnsetField", _wrap_Feature_UnsetField, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   30956             :     "UnsetField(int id)\n"
   30957             :     "Feature_UnsetField(Feature self, char const * field_name)\n"
   30958             :     "\n"
   30959             :     "void OGR_F_UnsetField(OGRFeatureH\n"
   30960             :     "hFeat, int iField)\n"
   30961             :     "\n"
   30962             :     "Clear a field, marking it as unset.\n"
   30963             :     "\n"
   30964             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method OGRFeature::UnsetField().\n"
   30965             :     "\n"
   30966             :     "Parameters:\n"
   30967             :     "-----------\n"
   30968             :     "\n"
   30969             :     "hFeat:  handle to the feature on which the field is.\n"
   30970             :     "\n"
   30971             :     "iField:  the field to unset. \n"
   30972             :     ""},
   30973             :    { (char *)"Feature_SetFieldNull", _wrap_Feature_SetFieldNull, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   30974             :     "SetFieldNull(int id)\n"
   30975             :     "Feature_SetFieldNull(Feature self, char const * field_name)\n"
   30976             :     "\n"
   30977             :     "void\n"
   30978             :     "OGR_F_SetFieldNull(OGRFeatureH hFeat, int iField)\n"
   30979             :     "\n"
   30980             :     "Clear a field, marking it as null.\n"
   30981             :     "\n"
   30982             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method\n"
   30983             :     "OGRFeature::SetFieldNull().\n"
   30984             :     "\n"
   30985             :     "Parameters:\n"
   30986             :     "-----------\n"
   30987             :     "\n"
   30988             :     "hFeat:  handle to the feature on which the field is.\n"
   30989             :     "\n"
   30990             :     "iField:  the field to set to null.\n"
   30991             :     "\n"
   30992             :     "GDAL 2.2 \n"
   30993             :     ""},
   30994             :    { (char *)"Feature_SetFieldInteger64", _wrap_Feature_SetFieldInteger64, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   30995             :     "Feature_SetFieldInteger64(Feature self, int id, GIntBig value)\n"
   30996             :     "\n"
   30997             :     "void\n"
   30998             :     "OGR_F_SetFieldInteger64(OGRFeatureH hFeat, int iField, GIntBig nValue)\n"
   30999             :     "\n"
   31000             :     "Set field to 64 bit integer value.\n"
   31001             :     "\n"
   31002             :     "OFTInteger, OFTInteger64 and OFTReal fields will be set directly.\n"
   31003             :     "OFTString fields will be assigned a string representation of the\n"
   31004             :     "value, but not necessarily taking into account formatting constraints\n"
   31005             :     "on this field. Other field types may be unaffected.\n"
   31006             :     "\n"
   31007             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method OGRFeature::SetField().\n"
   31008             :     "\n"
   31009             :     "This method has only an effect on the in-memory feature object. If\n"
   31010             :     "this object comes from a layer and the modifications must be\n"
   31011             :     "serialized back to the datasource, OGR_L_SetFeature() must be used\n"
   31012             :     "afterwards. Or if this is a new feature, OGR_L_CreateFeature() must be\n"
   31013             :     "used afterwards.\n"
   31014             :     "\n"
   31015             :     "Parameters:\n"
   31016             :     "-----------\n"
   31017             :     "\n"
   31018             :     "hFeat:  handle to the feature that owned the field.\n"
   31019             :     "\n"
   31020             :     "iField:  the field to fetch, from 0 to GetFieldCount()-1.\n"
   31021             :     "\n"
   31022             :     "nValue:  the value to assign.\n"
   31023             :     "\n"
   31024             :     "GDAL 2.0 \n"
   31025             :     ""},
   31026             :    { (char *)"Feature_SetField", _wrap_Feature_SetField, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   31027             :     "SetField(int id, char const * value)\n"
   31028             :     "SetField(char const * field_name, char const * value)\n"
   31029             :     "SetField(int id, double value)\n"
   31030             :     "SetField(char const * field_name, double value)\n"
   31031             :     "SetField(int id, int year, int month, int day, int hour, int minute, float second, int tzflag)\n"
   31032             :     "Feature_SetField(Feature self, char const * field_name, int year, int month, int day, int hour, int minute, float second, int tzflag)\n"
   31033             :     ""},
   31034             :    { (char *)"Feature_SetFieldIntegerList", _wrap_Feature_SetFieldIntegerList, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   31035             :     "Feature_SetFieldIntegerList(Feature self, int id, int nList)\n"
   31036             :     "\n"
   31037             :     "void\n"
   31038             :     "OGR_F_SetFieldIntegerList(OGRFeatureH hFeat, int iField, int nCount,\n"
   31039             :     "const int *panValues)\n"
   31040             :     "\n"
   31041             :     "Set field to list of integers value.\n"
   31042             :     "\n"
   31043             :     "This function currently on has an effect of OFTIntegerList,\n"
   31044             :     "OFTInteger64List and OFTRealList fields.\n"
   31045             :     "\n"
   31046             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method OGRFeature::SetField().\n"
   31047             :     "\n"
   31048             :     "This method has only an effect on the in-memory feature object. If\n"
   31049             :     "this object comes from a layer and the modifications must be\n"
   31050             :     "serialized back to the datasource, OGR_L_SetFeature() must be used\n"
   31051             :     "afterwards. Or if this is a new feature, OGR_L_CreateFeature() must be\n"
   31052             :     "used afterwards.\n"
   31053             :     "\n"
   31054             :     "Parameters:\n"
   31055             :     "-----------\n"
   31056             :     "\n"
   31057             :     "hFeat:  handle to the feature that owned the field.\n"
   31058             :     "\n"
   31059             :     "iField:  the field to set, from 0 to GetFieldCount()-1.\n"
   31060             :     "\n"
   31061             :     "nCount:  the number of values in the list being assigned.\n"
   31062             :     "\n"
   31063             :     "panValues:  the values to assign. \n"
   31064             :     ""},
   31065             :    { (char *)"Feature_SetFieldInteger64List", _wrap_Feature_SetFieldInteger64List, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   31066             :     "Feature_SetFieldInteger64List(Feature self, int id, int nList)\n"
   31067             :     "\n"
   31068             :     "void\n"
   31069             :     "OGR_F_SetFieldInteger64List(OGRFeatureH hFeat, int iField, int nCount,\n"
   31070             :     "const GIntBig *panValues)\n"
   31071             :     "\n"
   31072             :     "Set field to list of 64 bit integers value.\n"
   31073             :     "\n"
   31074             :     "This function currently on has an effect of OFTIntegerList,\n"
   31075             :     "OFTInteger64List and OFTRealList fields.\n"
   31076             :     "\n"
   31077             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method OGRFeature::SetField().\n"
   31078             :     "\n"
   31079             :     "This method has only an effect on the in-memory feature object. If\n"
   31080             :     "this object comes from a layer and the modifications must be\n"
   31081             :     "serialized back to the datasource, OGR_L_SetFeature() must be used\n"
   31082             :     "afterwards. Or if this is a new feature, OGR_L_CreateFeature() must be\n"
   31083             :     "used afterwards.\n"
   31084             :     "\n"
   31085             :     "Parameters:\n"
   31086             :     "-----------\n"
   31087             :     "\n"
   31088             :     "hFeat:  handle to the feature that owned the field.\n"
   31089             :     "\n"
   31090             :     "iField:  the field to set, from 0 to GetFieldCount()-1.\n"
   31091             :     "\n"
   31092             :     "nCount:  the number of values in the list being assigned.\n"
   31093             :     "\n"
   31094             :     "panValues:  the values to assign.\n"
   31095             :     "\n"
   31096             :     "GDAL 2.0 \n"
   31097             :     ""},
   31098             :    { (char *)"Feature_SetFieldDoubleList", _wrap_Feature_SetFieldDoubleList, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   31099             :     "Feature_SetFieldDoubleList(Feature self, int id, int nList)\n"
   31100             :     "\n"
   31101             :     "void\n"
   31102             :     "OGR_F_SetFieldDoubleList(OGRFeatureH hFeat, int iField, int nCount,\n"
   31103             :     "const double *padfValues)\n"
   31104             :     "\n"
   31105             :     "Set field to list of doubles value.\n"
   31106             :     "\n"
   31107             :     "This function currently on has an effect of OFTIntegerList,\n"
   31108             :     "OFTInteger64List, OFTRealList fields.\n"
   31109             :     "\n"
   31110             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method OGRFeature::SetField().\n"
   31111             :     "\n"
   31112             :     "This method has only an effect on the in-memory feature object. If\n"
   31113             :     "this object comes from a layer and the modifications must be\n"
   31114             :     "serialized back to the datasource, OGR_L_SetFeature() must be used\n"
   31115             :     "afterwards. Or if this is a new feature, OGR_L_CreateFeature() must be\n"
   31116             :     "used afterwards.\n"
   31117             :     "\n"
   31118             :     "Parameters:\n"
   31119             :     "-----------\n"
   31120             :     "\n"
   31121             :     "hFeat:  handle to the feature that owned the field.\n"
   31122             :     "\n"
   31123             :     "iField:  the field to set, from 0 to GetFieldCount()-1.\n"
   31124             :     "\n"
   31125             :     "nCount:  the number of values in the list being assigned.\n"
   31126             :     "\n"
   31127             :     "padfValues:  the values to assign. \n"
   31128             :     ""},
   31129             :    { (char *)"Feature_SetFieldStringList", _wrap_Feature_SetFieldStringList, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   31130             :     "Feature_SetFieldStringList(Feature self, int id, char ** pList)\n"
   31131             :     "\n"
   31132             :     "void\n"
   31133             :     "OGR_F_SetFieldStringList(OGRFeatureH hFeat, int iField, CSLConstList\n"
   31134             :     "papszValues)\n"
   31135             :     "\n"
   31136             :     "Set field to list of strings value.\n"
   31137             :     "\n"
   31138             :     "This function currently on has an effect of OFTStringList fields.\n"
   31139             :     "\n"
   31140             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method OGRFeature::SetField().\n"
   31141             :     "\n"
   31142             :     "This method has only an effect on the in-memory feature object. If\n"
   31143             :     "this object comes from a layer and the modifications must be\n"
   31144             :     "serialized back to the datasource, OGR_L_SetFeature() must be used\n"
   31145             :     "afterwards. Or if this is a new feature, OGR_L_CreateFeature() must be\n"
   31146             :     "used afterwards.\n"
   31147             :     "\n"
   31148             :     "Parameters:\n"
   31149             :     "-----------\n"
   31150             :     "\n"
   31151             :     "hFeat:  handle to the feature that owned the field.\n"
   31152             :     "\n"
   31153             :     "iField:  the field to set, from 0 to GetFieldCount()-1.\n"
   31154             :     "\n"
   31155             :     "papszValues:  the values to assign. List of NUL-terminated string,\n"
   31156             :     "ending with a NULL pointer. \n"
   31157             :     ""},
   31158             :    { (char *)"Feature_SetFieldBinaryFromHexString", _wrap_Feature_SetFieldBinaryFromHexString, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   31159             :     "SetFieldBinaryFromHexString(int id, char const * pszValue)\n"
   31160             :     "Feature_SetFieldBinaryFromHexString(Feature self, char const * field_name, char const * pszValue)\n"
   31161             :     ""},
   31162             :    { (char *)"Feature_SetFrom", (PyCFunction) _wrap_Feature_SetFrom, METH_VARARGS | METH_KEYWORDS, (char *)"\n"
   31163             :     "Feature_SetFrom(Feature self, Feature other, int forgiving=1) -> OGRErr\n"
   31164             :     "\n"
   31165             :     "OGRErr OGR_F_SetFrom(OGRFeatureH\n"
   31166             :     "hFeat, OGRFeatureH hOtherFeat, int bForgiving)\n"
   31167             :     "\n"
   31168             :     "Set one feature from another.\n"
   31169             :     "\n"
   31170             :     "Overwrite the contents of this feature from the geometry and\n"
   31171             :     "attributes of another. The hOtherFeature does not need to have the\n"
   31172             :     "same OGRFeatureDefn. Field values are copied by corresponding field\n"
   31173             :     "names. Field types do not have to exactly match. OGR_F_SetField*()\n"
   31174             :     "function conversion rules will be applied as needed.\n"
   31175             :     "\n"
   31176             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method OGRFeature::SetFrom().\n"
   31177             :     "\n"
   31178             :     "Parameters:\n"
   31179             :     "-----------\n"
   31180             :     "\n"
   31181             :     "hFeat:  handle to the feature to set to.\n"
   31182             :     "\n"
   31183             :     "hOtherFeat:  handle to the feature from which geometry, and field\n"
   31184             :     "values will be copied.\n"
   31185             :     "\n"
   31186             :     "bForgiving:  TRUE if the operation should continue despite lacking\n"
   31187             :     "output fields matching some of the source fields.\n"
   31188             :     "\n"
   31189             :     "OGRERR_NONE if the operation succeeds, even if some values are not\n"
   31190             :     "transferred, otherwise an error code. \n"
   31191             :     ""},
   31192             :    { (char *)"Feature_SetFromWithMap", _wrap_Feature_SetFromWithMap, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   31193             :     "Feature_SetFromWithMap(Feature self, Feature other, int forgiving, int nList) -> OGRErr\n"
   31194             :     "\n"
   31195             :     "OGRErr\n"
   31196             :     "OGR_F_SetFromWithMap(OGRFeatureH hFeat, OGRFeatureH hOtherFeat, int\n"
   31197             :     "bForgiving, const int *panMap)\n"
   31198             :     "\n"
   31199             :     "Set one feature from another.\n"
   31200             :     "\n"
   31201             :     "Overwrite the contents of this feature from the geometry and\n"
   31202             :     "attributes of another. The hOtherFeature does not need to have the\n"
   31203             :     "same OGRFeatureDefn. Field values are copied according to the provided\n"
   31204             :     "indices map. Field types do not have to exactly match.\n"
   31205             :     "OGR_F_SetField*() function conversion rules will be applied as needed.\n"
   31206             :     "This is more efficient than OGR_F_SetFrom() in that this doesn't\n"
   31207             :     "lookup the fields by their names. Particularly useful when the field\n"
   31208             :     "names don't match.\n"
   31209             :     "\n"
   31210             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method OGRFeature::SetFrom().\n"
   31211             :     "\n"
   31212             :     "Parameters:\n"
   31213             :     "-----------\n"
   31214             :     "\n"
   31215             :     "hFeat:  handle to the feature to set to.\n"
   31216             :     "\n"
   31217             :     "hOtherFeat:  handle to the feature from which geometry, and field\n"
   31218             :     "values will be copied.\n"
   31219             :     "\n"
   31220             :     "panMap:  Array of the indices of the destination feature's fields\n"
   31221             :     "stored at the corresponding index of the source feature's fields. A\n"
   31222             :     "value of -1 should be used to ignore the source's field. The array\n"
   31223             :     "should not be NULL and be as long as the number of fields in the\n"
   31224             :     "source feature.\n"
   31225             :     "\n"
   31226             :     "bForgiving:  TRUE if the operation should continue despite lacking\n"
   31227             :     "output fields matching some of the source fields.\n"
   31228             :     "\n"
   31229             :     "OGRERR_NONE if the operation succeeds, even if some values are not\n"
   31230             :     "transferred, otherwise an error code. \n"
   31231             :     ""},
   31232             :    { (char *)"Feature_GetStyleString", _wrap_Feature_GetStyleString, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   31233             :     "Feature_GetStyleString(Feature self) -> char const *\n"
   31234             :     "\n"
   31235             :     "const char*\n"
   31236             :     "OGR_F_GetStyleString(OGRFeatureH hFeat)\n"
   31237             :     "\n"
   31238             :     "Fetch style string for this feature.\n"
   31239             :     "\n"
   31240             :     "Set the OGR Feature Style Specification for details on the format of\n"
   31241             :     "this string, and ogr_featurestyle.h for services available to parse\n"
   31242             :     "it.\n"
   31243             :     "\n"
   31244             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method\n"
   31245             :     "OGRFeature::GetStyleString().\n"
   31246             :     "\n"
   31247             :     "Parameters:\n"
   31248             :     "-----------\n"
   31249             :     "\n"
   31250             :     "hFeat:  handle to the feature to get the style from.\n"
   31251             :     "\n"
   31252             :     "a reference to a representation in string format, or NULL if there\n"
   31253             :     "isn't one. \n"
   31254             :     ""},
   31255             :    { (char *)"Feature_SetStyleString", _wrap_Feature_SetStyleString, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   31256             :     "Feature_SetStyleString(Feature self, char const * the_string)\n"
   31257             :     "\n"
   31258             :     "void\n"
   31259             :     "OGR_F_SetStyleString(OGRFeatureH hFeat, const char *pszStyle)\n"
   31260             :     "\n"
   31261             :     "Set feature style string.\n"
   31262             :     "\n"
   31263             :     "This method operate exactly as OGR_F_SetStyleStringDirectly() except\n"
   31264             :     "that it does not assume ownership of the passed string, but instead\n"
   31265             :     "makes a copy of it.\n"
   31266             :     "\n"
   31267             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method\n"
   31268             :     "OGRFeature::SetStyleString().\n"
   31269             :     "\n"
   31270             :     "Parameters:\n"
   31271             :     "-----------\n"
   31272             :     "\n"
   31273             :     "hFeat:  handle to the feature to set style to.\n"
   31274             :     "\n"
   31275             :     "pszStyle:  the style string to apply to this feature, cannot be NULL.\n"
   31276             :     "\n"
   31277             :     ""},
   31278             :    { (char *)"Feature_GetFieldType", _wrap_Feature_GetFieldType, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   31279             :     "GetFieldType(int id) -> OGRFieldType\n"
   31280             :     "Feature_GetFieldType(Feature self, char const * field_name) -> OGRFieldType\n"
   31281             :     ""},
   31282             :    { (char *)"Feature_Validate", _wrap_Feature_Validate, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   31283             :     "Feature_Validate(Feature self, int flags, int bEmitError=True) -> int\n"
   31284             :     "\n"
   31285             :     "int OGR_F_Validate(OGRFeatureH\n"
   31286             :     "hFeat, int nValidateFlags, int bEmitError)\n"
   31287             :     "\n"
   31288             :     "Validate that a feature meets constraints of its schema.\n"
   31289             :     "\n"
   31290             :     "The scope of test is specified with the nValidateFlags parameter.\n"
   31291             :     "\n"
   31292             :     "Regarding OGR_F_VAL_WIDTH, the test is done assuming the string width\n"
   31293             :     "must be interpreted as the number of UTF-8 characters. Some drivers\n"
   31294             :     "might interpret the width as the number of bytes instead. So this test\n"
   31295             :     "is rather conservative (if it fails, then it will fail for all\n"
   31296             :     "interpretations).\n"
   31297             :     "\n"
   31298             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method OGRFeature::Validate().\n"
   31299             :     "\n"
   31300             :     "Parameters:\n"
   31301             :     "-----------\n"
   31302             :     "\n"
   31303             :     "hFeat:  handle to the feature to validate.\n"
   31304             :     "\n"
   31305             :     "nValidateFlags:  OGR_F_VAL_ALL or combination of OGR_F_VAL_NULL,\n"
   31306             :     "OGR_F_VAL_GEOM_TYPE, OGR_F_VAL_WIDTH and\n"
   31307             :     "OGR_F_VAL_ALLOW_NULL_WHEN_DEFAULT with '|' operator\n"
   31308             :     "\n"
   31309             :     "bEmitError:  TRUE if a CPLError() must be emitted when a check fails\n"
   31310             :     "\n"
   31311             :     "TRUE if all enabled validation tests pass.\n"
   31312             :     "\n"
   31313             :     "GDAL 2.0 \n"
   31314             :     ""},
   31315             :    { (char *)"Feature_FillUnsetWithDefault", _wrap_Feature_FillUnsetWithDefault, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   31316             :     "Feature_FillUnsetWithDefault(Feature self, int bNotNullableOnly=False, char ** options=None)\n"
   31317             :     "\n"
   31318             :     "void\n"
   31319             :     "OGR_F_FillUnsetWithDefault(OGRFeatureH hFeat, int bNotNullableOnly,\n"
   31320             :     "char **papszOptions)\n"
   31321             :     "\n"
   31322             :     "Fill unset fields with default values that might be defined.\n"
   31323             :     "\n"
   31324             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method\n"
   31325             :     "OGRFeature::FillUnsetWithDefault().\n"
   31326             :     "\n"
   31327             :     "Parameters:\n"
   31328             :     "-----------\n"
   31329             :     "\n"
   31330             :     "hFeat:  handle to the feature.\n"
   31331             :     "\n"
   31332             :     "bNotNullableOnly:  if we should fill only unset fields with a not-null\n"
   31333             :     "constraint.\n"
   31334             :     "\n"
   31335             :     "papszOptions:  unused currently. Must be set to NULL.\n"
   31336             :     "\n"
   31337             :     "GDAL 2.0 \n"
   31338             :     ""},
   31339             :    { (char *)"Feature_GetNativeData", _wrap_Feature_GetNativeData, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   31340             :     "Feature_GetNativeData(Feature self) -> char const *\n"
   31341             :     "\n"
   31342             :     "const char*\n"
   31343             :     "OGR_F_GetNativeData(OGRFeatureH hFeat)\n"
   31344             :     "\n"
   31345             :     "Returns the native data for the feature.\n"
   31346             :     "\n"
   31347             :     "The native data is the representation in a \"natural\" form that comes\n"
   31348             :     "from the driver that created this feature, or that is aimed at an\n"
   31349             :     "output driver. The native data may be in different format, which is\n"
   31350             :     "indicated by OGR_F_GetNativeMediaType().\n"
   31351             :     "\n"
   31352             :     "Note that most drivers do not support storing the native data in the\n"
   31353             :     "feature object, and if they do, generally the NATIVE_DATA open option\n"
   31354             :     "must be passed at dataset opening.\n"
   31355             :     "\n"
   31356             :     "The \"native data\" does not imply it is something more performant or\n"
   31357             :     "powerful than what can be obtained with the rest of the API, but it\n"
   31358             :     "may be useful in round-tripping scenarios where some characteristics\n"
   31359             :     "of the underlying format are not captured otherwise by the OGR\n"
   31360             :     "abstraction.\n"
   31361             :     "\n"
   31362             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method\n"
   31363             :     "OGRFeature::GetNativeData().\n"
   31364             :     "\n"
   31365             :     "Parameters:\n"
   31366             :     "-----------\n"
   31367             :     "\n"
   31368             :     "hFeat:  handle to the feature.\n"
   31369             :     "\n"
   31370             :     "a string with the native data, or NULL if there is none.\n"
   31371             :     "\n"
   31372             :     "GDAL 2.1\n"
   31373             :     "\n"
   31374             :     "See:\n"
   31375             :     "https://trac.osgeo.org/gdal/wiki/rfc60_improved_roundtripping_in_ogr\n"
   31376             :     "\n"
   31377             :     ""},
   31378             :    { (char *)"Feature_GetNativeMediaType", _wrap_Feature_GetNativeMediaType, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   31379             :     "Feature_GetNativeMediaType(Feature self) -> char const *\n"
   31380             :     "\n"
   31381             :     "const char*\n"
   31382             :     "OGR_F_GetNativeMediaType(OGRFeatureH hFeat)\n"
   31383             :     "\n"
   31384             :     "Returns the native media type for the feature.\n"
   31385             :     "\n"
   31386             :     "The native media type is the identifier for the format of the native\n"
   31387             :     "data. It follows the IANA RFC 2045\n"
   31388             :     "(seehttps://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Media_type), e.g.\n"
   31389             :     "\"application/vnd.geo+json\" for JSon.\n"
   31390             :     "\n"
   31391             :     "This function is the same as the C function\n"
   31392             :     "OGR_F_GetNativeMediaType().\n"
   31393             :     "\n"
   31394             :     "Parameters:\n"
   31395             :     "-----------\n"
   31396             :     "\n"
   31397             :     "hFeat:  handle to the feature.\n"
   31398             :     "\n"
   31399             :     "a string with the native media type, or NULL if there is none.\n"
   31400             :     "\n"
   31401             :     "GDAL 2.1\n"
   31402             :     "\n"
   31403             :     "See:\n"
   31404             :     "https://trac.osgeo.org/gdal/wiki/rfc60_improved_roundtripping_in_ogr\n"
   31405             :     "\n"
   31406             :     ""},
   31407             :    { (char *)"Feature_SetNativeData", _wrap_Feature_SetNativeData, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   31408             :     "Feature_SetNativeData(Feature self, char const * nativeData)\n"
   31409             :     "\n"
   31410             :     "void\n"
   31411             :     "OGR_F_SetNativeData(OGRFeatureH hFeat, const char *pszNativeData)\n"
   31412             :     "\n"
   31413             :     "Sets the native data for the feature.\n"
   31414             :     "\n"
   31415             :     "The native data is the representation in a \"natural\" form that comes\n"
   31416             :     "from the driver that created this feature, or that is aimed at an\n"
   31417             :     "output driver. The native data may be in different format, which is\n"
   31418             :     "indicated by OGR_F_GetNativeMediaType().\n"
   31419             :     "\n"
   31420             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method\n"
   31421             :     "OGRFeature::SetNativeData().\n"
   31422             :     "\n"
   31423             :     "Parameters:\n"
   31424             :     "-----------\n"
   31425             :     "\n"
   31426             :     "hFeat:  handle to the feature.\n"
   31427             :     "\n"
   31428             :     "pszNativeData:  a string with the native data, or NULL if there is\n"
   31429             :     "none.\n"
   31430             :     "\n"
   31431             :     "GDAL 2.1\n"
   31432             :     "\n"
   31433             :     "See:\n"
   31434             :     "https://trac.osgeo.org/gdal/wiki/rfc60_improved_roundtripping_in_ogr\n"
   31435             :     "\n"
   31436             :     ""},
   31437             :    { (char *)"Feature_SetNativeMediaType", _wrap_Feature_SetNativeMediaType, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   31438             :     "Feature_SetNativeMediaType(Feature self, char const * nativeMediaType)\n"
   31439             :     "\n"
   31440             :     "void\n"
   31441             :     "OGR_F_SetNativeMediaType(OGRFeatureH hFeat, const char\n"
   31442             :     "*pszNativeMediaType)\n"
   31443             :     "\n"
   31444             :     "Sets the native media type for the feature.\n"
   31445             :     "\n"
   31446             :     "The native media type is the identifier for the format of the native\n"
   31447             :     "data. It follows the IANA RFC 2045\n"
   31448             :     "(seehttps://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Media_type), e.g.\n"
   31449             :     "\"application/vnd.geo+json\" for JSon.\n"
   31450             :     "\n"
   31451             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method\n"
   31452             :     "OGRFeature::SetNativeMediaType().\n"
   31453             :     "\n"
   31454             :     "Parameters:\n"
   31455             :     "-----------\n"
   31456             :     "\n"
   31457             :     "hFeat:  handle to the feature.\n"
   31458             :     "\n"
   31459             :     "pszNativeMediaType:  a string with the native media type, or NULL if\n"
   31460             :     "there is none.\n"
   31461             :     "\n"
   31462             :     "GDAL 2.1\n"
   31463             :     "\n"
   31464             :     "See:\n"
   31465             :     "https://trac.osgeo.org/gdal/wiki/rfc60_improved_roundtripping_in_ogr\n"
   31466             :     "\n"
   31467             :     ""},
   31468             :    { (char *)"Feature_SetFieldString", _wrap_Feature_SetFieldString, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   31469             :     "Feature_SetFieldString(Feature self, int id, char const * value)\n"
   31470             :     "\n"
   31471             :     "void\n"
   31472             :     "OGR_F_SetFieldString(OGRFeatureH hFeat, int iField, const char\n"
   31473             :     "*pszValue)\n"
   31474             :     "\n"
   31475             :     "Set field to string value.\n"
   31476             :     "\n"
   31477             :     "OFTInteger fields will be set based on an atoi() conversion of the\n"
   31478             :     "string. OFTInteger64 fields will be set based on an CPLAtoGIntBig()\n"
   31479             :     "conversion of the string. OFTReal fields will be set based on an\n"
   31480             :     "CPLAtof() conversion of the string. Other field types may be\n"
   31481             :     "unaffected.\n"
   31482             :     "\n"
   31483             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method OGRFeature::SetField().\n"
   31484             :     "\n"
   31485             :     "This method has only an effect on the in-memory feature object. If\n"
   31486             :     "this object comes from a layer and the modifications must be\n"
   31487             :     "serialized back to the datasource, OGR_L_SetFeature() must be used\n"
   31488             :     "afterwards. Or if this is a new feature, OGR_L_CreateFeature() must be\n"
   31489             :     "used afterwards.\n"
   31490             :     "\n"
   31491             :     "Parameters:\n"
   31492             :     "-----------\n"
   31493             :     "\n"
   31494             :     "hFeat:  handle to the feature that owned the field.\n"
   31495             :     "\n"
   31496             :     "iField:  the field to fetch, from 0 to GetFieldCount()-1.\n"
   31497             :     "\n"
   31498             :     "pszValue:  the value to assign. \n"
   31499             :     ""},
   31500             :    { (char *)"Feature_swigregister", Feature_swigregister, METH_VARARGS, NULL},
   31501             :    { (char *)"delete_FeatureDefn", _wrap_delete_FeatureDefn, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"delete_FeatureDefn(FeatureDefn self)"},
   31502             :    { (char *)"new_FeatureDefn", (PyCFunction) _wrap_new_FeatureDefn, METH_VARARGS | METH_KEYWORDS, (char *)"new_FeatureDefn(char const * name_null_ok=None) -> FeatureDefn"},
   31503             :    { (char *)"FeatureDefn_GetName", _wrap_FeatureDefn_GetName, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   31504             :     "FeatureDefn_GetName(FeatureDefn self) -> char const *\n"
   31505             :     "\n"
   31506             :     "const char*\n"
   31507             :     "OGR_FD_GetName(OGRFeatureDefnH hDefn)\n"
   31508             :     "\n"
   31509             :     "Get name of the OGRFeatureDefn passed as an argument.\n"
   31510             :     "\n"
   31511             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method OGRFeatureDefn::GetName().\n"
   31512             :     "\n"
   31513             :     "Parameters:\n"
   31514             :     "-----------\n"
   31515             :     "\n"
   31516             :     "hDefn:  handle to the feature definition to get the name from.\n"
   31517             :     "\n"
   31518             :     "the name. This name is internal and should not be modified, or freed.\n"
   31519             :     "\n"
   31520             :     ""},
   31521             :    { (char *)"FeatureDefn_GetFieldCount", _wrap_FeatureDefn_GetFieldCount, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   31522             :     "FeatureDefn_GetFieldCount(FeatureDefn self) -> int\n"
   31523             :     "\n"
   31524             :     "int\n"
   31525             :     "OGR_FD_GetFieldCount(OGRFeatureDefnH hDefn)\n"
   31526             :     "\n"
   31527             :     "Fetch number of fields on the passed feature definition.\n"
   31528             :     "\n"
   31529             :     "This function is the same as the C++ OGRFeatureDefn::GetFieldCount().\n"
   31530             :     "\n"
   31531             :     "Parameters:\n"
   31532             :     "-----------\n"
   31533             :     "\n"
   31534             :     "hDefn:  handle to the feature definition to get the fields count from.\n"
   31535             :     "\n"
   31536             :     "count of fields. \n"
   31537             :     ""},
   31538             :    { (char *)"FeatureDefn_GetFieldDefn", _wrap_FeatureDefn_GetFieldDefn, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   31539             :     "FeatureDefn_GetFieldDefn(FeatureDefn self, int i) -> FieldDefn\n"
   31540             :     "\n"
   31541             :     "OGRFieldDefnH\n"
   31542             :     "OGR_FD_GetFieldDefn(OGRFeatureDefnH hDefn, int iField)\n"
   31543             :     "\n"
   31544             :     "Fetch field definition of the passed feature definition.\n"
   31545             :     "\n"
   31546             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method\n"
   31547             :     "OGRFeatureDefn::GetFieldDefn().\n"
   31548             :     "\n"
