   31549             :     "Parameters:\n"
   31550             :     "-----------\n"
   31551             :     "\n"
   31552             :     "hDefn:  handle to the feature definition to get the field definition\n"
   31553             :     "from.\n"
   31554             :     "\n"
   31555             :     "iField:  the field to fetch, between 0 and GetFieldCount()-1.\n"
   31556             :     "\n"
   31557             :     "an handle to an internal field definition object or NULL if invalid\n"
   31558             :     "index. This object should not be modified or freed by the application.\n"
   31559             :     "\n"
   31560             :     ""},
   31561             :    { (char *)"FeatureDefn_GetFieldIndex", _wrap_FeatureDefn_GetFieldIndex, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   31562             :     "FeatureDefn_GetFieldIndex(FeatureDefn self, char const * field_name) -> int\n"
   31563             :     "\n"
   31564             :     "int\n"
   31565             :     "OGR_FD_GetFieldIndex(OGRFeatureDefnH hDefn, const char *pszFieldName)\n"
   31566             :     "\n"
   31567             :     "Find field by name.\n"
   31568             :     "\n"
   31569             :     "The field index of the first field matching the passed field name\n"
   31570             :     "(case insensitively) is returned.\n"
   31571             :     "\n"
   31572             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method\n"
   31573             :     "OGRFeatureDefn::GetFieldIndex.\n"
   31574             :     "\n"
   31575             :     "Parameters:\n"
   31576             :     "-----------\n"
   31577             :     "\n"
   31578             :     "hDefn:  handle to the feature definition to get field index from.\n"
   31579             :     "\n"
   31580             :     "pszFieldName:  the field name to search for.\n"
   31581             :     "\n"
   31582             :     "the field index, or -1 if no match found. \n"
   31583             :     ""},
   31584             :    { (char *)"FeatureDefn_AddFieldDefn", _wrap_FeatureDefn_AddFieldDefn, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   31585             :     "FeatureDefn_AddFieldDefn(FeatureDefn self, FieldDefn defn)\n"
   31586             :     "\n"
   31587             :     "void\n"
   31588             :     "OGR_FD_AddFieldDefn(OGRFeatureDefnH hDefn, OGRFieldDefnH hNewField)\n"
   31589             :     "\n"
   31590             :     "Add a new field definition to the passed feature definition.\n"
   31591             :     "\n"
   31592             :     "To add a new field definition to a layer definition, do not use this\n"
   31593             :     "function directly, but use OGR_L_CreateField() instead.\n"
   31594             :     "\n"
   31595             :     "This function should only be called while there are no OGRFeature\n"
   31596             :     "objects in existence based on this OGRFeatureDefn. The OGRFieldDefn\n"
   31597             :     "passed in is copied, and remains the responsibility of the caller.\n"
   31598             :     "\n"
   31599             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method\n"
   31600             :     "OGRFeatureDefn::AddFieldDefn().\n"
   31601             :     "\n"
   31602             :     "Parameters:\n"
   31603             :     "-----------\n"
   31604             :     "\n"
   31605             :     "hDefn:  handle to the feature definition to add the field definition\n"
   31606             :     "to.\n"
   31607             :     "\n"
   31608             :     "hNewField:  handle to the new field definition. \n"
   31609             :     ""},
   31610             :    { (char *)"FeatureDefn_GetGeomFieldCount", _wrap_FeatureDefn_GetGeomFieldCount, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   31611             :     "FeatureDefn_GetGeomFieldCount(FeatureDefn self) -> int\n"
   31612             :     "\n"
   31613             :     "int\n"
   31614             :     "OGR_FD_GetGeomFieldCount(OGRFeatureDefnH hDefn)\n"
   31615             :     "\n"
   31616             :     "Fetch number of geometry fields on the passed feature definition.\n"
   31617             :     "\n"
   31618             :     "This function is the same as the C++\n"
   31619             :     "OGRFeatureDefn::GetGeomFieldCount().\n"
   31620             :     "\n"
   31621             :     "Parameters:\n"
   31622             :     "-----------\n"
   31623             :     "\n"
   31624             :     "hDefn:  handle to the feature definition to get the fields count from.\n"
   31625             :     "\n"
   31626             :     "count of geometry fields.\n"
   31627             :     "\n"
   31628             :     "GDAL 1.11 \n"
   31629             :     ""},
   31630             :    { (char *)"FeatureDefn_GetGeomFieldDefn", _wrap_FeatureDefn_GetGeomFieldDefn, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   31631             :     "FeatureDefn_GetGeomFieldDefn(FeatureDefn self, int i) -> GeomFieldDefn\n"
   31632             :     "\n"
   31633             :     "OGRGeomFieldDefnH\n"
   31634             :     "OGR_FD_GetGeomFieldDefn(OGRFeatureDefnH hDefn, int iGeomField)\n"
   31635             :     "\n"
   31636             :     "Fetch geometry field definition of the passed feature definition.\n"
   31637             :     "\n"
   31638             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method\n"
   31639             :     "OGRFeatureDefn::GetGeomFieldDefn().\n"
   31640             :     "\n"
   31641             :     "Parameters:\n"
   31642             :     "-----------\n"
   31643             :     "\n"
   31644             :     "hDefn:  handle to the feature definition to get the field definition\n"
   31645             :     "from.\n"
   31646             :     "\n"
   31647             :     "iGeomField:  the geometry field to fetch, between 0 and\n"
   31648             :     "GetGeomFieldCount() - 1.\n"
   31649             :     "\n"
   31650             :     "an handle to an internal field definition object or NULL if invalid\n"
   31651             :     "index. This object should not be modified or freed by the application.\n"
   31652             :     "\n"
   31653             :     "GDAL 1.11 \n"
   31654             :     ""},
   31655             :    { (char *)"FeatureDefn_GetGeomFieldIndex", _wrap_FeatureDefn_GetGeomFieldIndex, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   31656             :     "FeatureDefn_GetGeomFieldIndex(FeatureDefn self, char const * field_name) -> int\n"
   31657             :     "\n"
   31658             :     "int\n"
   31659             :     "OGR_FD_GetGeomFieldIndex(OGRFeatureDefnH hDefn, const char\n"
   31660             :     "*pszGeomFieldName)\n"
   31661             :     "\n"
   31662             :     "Find geometry field by name.\n"
   31663             :     "\n"
   31664             :     "The geometry field index of the first geometry field matching the\n"
   31665             :     "passed field name (case insensitively) is returned.\n"
   31666             :     "\n"
   31667             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method\n"
   31668             :     "OGRFeatureDefn::GetGeomFieldIndex.\n"
   31669             :     "\n"
   31670             :     "Parameters:\n"
   31671             :     "-----------\n"
   31672             :     "\n"
   31673             :     "hDefn:  handle to the feature definition to get field index from.\n"
   31674             :     "\n"
   31675             :     "pszGeomFieldName:  the geometry field name to search for.\n"
   31676             :     "\n"
   31677             :     "the geometry field index, or -1 if no match found. \n"
   31678             :     ""},
   31679             :    { (char *)"FeatureDefn_AddGeomFieldDefn", _wrap_FeatureDefn_AddGeomFieldDefn, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   31680             :     "FeatureDefn_AddGeomFieldDefn(FeatureDefn self, GeomFieldDefn defn)\n"
   31681             :     "\n"
   31682             :     "void\n"
   31683             :     "OGR_FD_AddGeomFieldDefn(OGRFeatureDefnH hDefn, OGRGeomFieldDefnH\n"
   31684             :     "hNewGeomField)\n"
   31685             :     "\n"
   31686             :     "Add a new field definition to the passed feature definition.\n"
   31687             :     "\n"
   31688             :     "To add a new field definition to a layer definition, do not use this\n"
   31689             :     "function directly, but use OGR_L_CreateGeomField() instead.\n"
   31690             :     "\n"
   31691             :     "This function should only be called while there are no OGRFeature\n"
   31692             :     "objects in existence based on this OGRFeatureDefn. The\n"
   31693             :     "OGRGeomFieldDefn passed in is copied, and remains the responsibility\n"
   31694             :     "of the caller.\n"
   31695             :     "\n"
   31696             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method\n"
   31697             :     "OGRFeatureDefn::AddGeomFieldDefn().\n"
   31698             :     "\n"
   31699             :     "Parameters:\n"
   31700             :     "-----------\n"
   31701             :     "\n"
   31702             :     "hDefn:  handle to the feature definition to add the geometry field\n"
   31703             :     "definition to.\n"
   31704             :     "\n"
   31705             :     "hNewGeomField:  handle to the new field definition.\n"
   31706             :     "\n"
   31707             :     "GDAL 1.11 \n"
   31708             :     ""},
   31709             :    { (char *)"FeatureDefn_DeleteGeomFieldDefn", _wrap_FeatureDefn_DeleteGeomFieldDefn, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   31710             :     "FeatureDefn_DeleteGeomFieldDefn(FeatureDefn self, int idx) -> OGRErr\n"
   31711             :     "\n"
   31712             :     "OGRErr\n"
   31713             :     "OGR_FD_DeleteGeomFieldDefn(OGRFeatureDefnH hDefn, int iGeomField)\n"
   31714             :     "\n"
   31715             :     "Delete an existing geometry field definition.\n"
   31716             :     "\n"
   31717             :     "To delete an existing geometry field definition from a layer\n"
   31718             :     "definition, do not use this function directly, but use\n"
   31719             :     "OGR_L_DeleteGeomField() instead ( not implemented yet).\n"
   31720             :     "\n"
   31721             :     "This method should only be called while there are no OGRFeature\n"
   31722             :     "objects in existence based on this OGRFeatureDefn.\n"
   31723             :     "\n"
   31724             :     "This method is the same as the C++ method\n"
   31725             :     "OGRFeatureDefn::DeleteGeomFieldDefn().\n"
   31726             :     "\n"
   31727             :     "Parameters:\n"
   31728             :     "-----------\n"
   31729             :     "\n"
   31730             :     "hDefn:  handle to the feature definition.\n"
   31731             :     "\n"
   31732             :     "iGeomField:  the index of the geometry field definition.\n"
   31733             :     "\n"
   31734             :     "OGRERR_NONE in case of success.\n"
   31735             :     "\n"
   31736             :     "GDAL 1.11 \n"
   31737             :     ""},
   31738             :    { (char *)"FeatureDefn_GetGeomType", _wrap_FeatureDefn_GetGeomType, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   31739             :     "FeatureDefn_GetGeomType(FeatureDefn self) -> OGRwkbGeometryType\n"
   31740             :     "\n"
   31741             :     "OGRwkbGeometryType\n"
   31742             :     "OGR_FD_GetGeomType(OGRFeatureDefnH hDefn)\n"
   31743             :     "\n"
   31744             :     "Fetch the geometry base type of the passed feature definition.\n"
   31745             :     "\n"
   31746             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method\n"
   31747             :     "OGRFeatureDefn::GetGeomType().\n"
   31748             :     "\n"
   31749             :     "Starting with GDAL 1.11, this method returns\n"
   31750             :     "GetGeomFieldDefn(0)->GetType().\n"
   31751             :     "\n"
   31752             :     "Parameters:\n"
   31753             :     "-----------\n"
   31754             :     "\n"
   31755             :     "hDefn:  handle to the feature definition to get the geometry type\n"
   31756             :     "from.\n"
   31757             :     "\n"
   31758             :     "the base type for all geometry related to this definition. \n"
   31759             :     ""},
   31760             :    { (char *)"FeatureDefn_SetGeomType", _wrap_FeatureDefn_SetGeomType, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   31761             :     "FeatureDefn_SetGeomType(FeatureDefn self, OGRwkbGeometryType geom_type)\n"
   31762             :     "\n"
   31763             :     "void\n"
   31764             :     "OGR_FD_SetGeomType(OGRFeatureDefnH hDefn, OGRwkbGeometryType eType)\n"
   31765             :     "\n"
   31766             :     "Assign the base geometry type for the passed layer (the same as the\n"
   31767             :     "feature definition).\n"
   31768             :     "\n"
   31769             :     "All geometry objects using this type must be of the defined type or a\n"
   31770             :     "derived type. The default upon creation is wkbUnknown which allows for\n"
   31771             :     "any geometry type. The geometry type should generally not be changed\n"
   31772             :     "after any OGRFeatures have been created against this definition.\n"
   31773             :     "\n"
   31774             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method\n"
   31775             :     "OGRFeatureDefn::SetGeomType().\n"
   31776             :     "\n"
   31777             :     "Starting with GDAL 1.11, this method calls\n"
   31778             :     "GetGeomFieldDefn(0)->SetType().\n"
   31779             :     "\n"
   31780             :     "Parameters:\n"
   31781             :     "-----------\n"
   31782             :     "\n"
   31783             :     "hDefn:  handle to the layer or feature definition to set the geometry\n"
   31784             :     "type to.\n"
   31785             :     "\n"
   31786             :     "eType:  the new type to assign. \n"
   31787             :     ""},
   31788             :    { (char *)"FeatureDefn_GetReferenceCount", _wrap_FeatureDefn_GetReferenceCount, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   31789             :     "FeatureDefn_GetReferenceCount(FeatureDefn self) -> int\n"
   31790             :     "\n"
   31791             :     "int\n"
   31792             :     "OGR_FD_GetReferenceCount(OGRFeatureDefnH hDefn)\n"
   31793             :     "\n"
   31794             :     "Fetch current reference count.\n"
   31795             :     "\n"
   31796             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method\n"
   31797             :     "OGRFeatureDefn::GetReferenceCount().\n"
   31798             :     "\n"
   31799             :     "Parameters:\n"
   31800             :     "-----------\n"
   31801             :     "\n"
   31802             :     "hDefn:  handle to the feature definition on witch OGRFeature are based\n"
   31803             :     "on.\n"
   31804             :     "\n"
   31805             :     "the current reference count. \n"
   31806             :     ""},
   31807             :    { (char *)"FeatureDefn_IsGeometryIgnored", _wrap_FeatureDefn_IsGeometryIgnored, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   31808             :     "FeatureDefn_IsGeometryIgnored(FeatureDefn self) -> int\n"
   31809             :     "\n"
   31810             :     "int\n"
   31811             :     "OGR_FD_IsGeometryIgnored(OGRFeatureDefnH hDefn)\n"
   31812             :     "\n"
   31813             :     "Determine whether the geometry can be omitted when fetching features.\n"
   31814             :     "\n"
   31815             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method\n"
   31816             :     "OGRFeatureDefn::IsGeometryIgnored().\n"
   31817             :     "\n"
   31818             :     "Starting with GDAL 1.11, this method returns\n"
   31819             :     "GetGeomFieldDefn(0)->IsIgnored().\n"
   31820             :     "\n"
   31821             :     "Parameters:\n"
   31822             :     "-----------\n"
   31823             :     "\n"
   31824             :     "hDefn:  handle to the feature definition on witch OGRFeature are based\n"
   31825             :     "on.\n"
   31826             :     "\n"
   31827             :     "ignore state \n"
   31828             :     ""},
   31829             :    { (char *)"FeatureDefn_SetGeometryIgnored", _wrap_FeatureDefn_SetGeometryIgnored, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   31830             :     "FeatureDefn_SetGeometryIgnored(FeatureDefn self, int bIgnored)\n"
   31831             :     "\n"
   31832             :     "void\n"
   31833             :     "OGR_FD_SetGeometryIgnored(OGRFeatureDefnH hDefn, int bIgnore)\n"
   31834             :     "\n"
   31835             :     "Set whether the geometry can be omitted when fetching features.\n"
   31836             :     "\n"
   31837             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method\n"
   31838             :     "OGRFeatureDefn::SetGeometryIgnored().\n"
   31839             :     "\n"
   31840             :     "Starting with GDAL 1.11, this method calls\n"
   31841             :     "GetGeomFieldDefn(0)->SetIgnored().\n"
   31842             :     "\n"
   31843             :     "Parameters:\n"
   31844             :     "-----------\n"
   31845             :     "\n"
   31846             :     "hDefn:  handle to the feature definition on witch OGRFeature are based\n"
   31847             :     "on.\n"
   31848             :     "\n"
   31849             :     "bIgnore:  ignore state \n"
   31850             :     ""},
   31851             :    { (char *)"FeatureDefn_IsStyleIgnored", _wrap_FeatureDefn_IsStyleIgnored, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   31852             :     "FeatureDefn_IsStyleIgnored(FeatureDefn self) -> int\n"
   31853             :     "\n"
   31854             :     "int\n"
   31855             :     "OGR_FD_IsStyleIgnored(OGRFeatureDefnH hDefn)\n"
   31856             :     "\n"
   31857             :     "Determine whether the style can be omitted when fetching features.\n"
   31858             :     "\n"
   31859             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method\n"
   31860             :     "OGRFeatureDefn::IsStyleIgnored().\n"
   31861             :     "\n"
   31862             :     "Parameters:\n"
   31863             :     "-----------\n"
   31864             :     "\n"
   31865             :     "hDefn:  handle to the feature definition on which OGRFeature are based\n"
   31866             :     "on.\n"
   31867             :     "\n"
   31868             :     "ignore state \n"
   31869             :     ""},
   31870             :    { (char *)"FeatureDefn_SetStyleIgnored", _wrap_FeatureDefn_SetStyleIgnored, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   31871             :     "FeatureDefn_SetStyleIgnored(FeatureDefn self, int bIgnored)\n"
   31872             :     "\n"
   31873             :     "void\n"
   31874             :     "OGR_FD_SetStyleIgnored(OGRFeatureDefnH hDefn, int bIgnore)\n"
   31875             :     "\n"
   31876             :     "Set whether the style can be omitted when fetching features.\n"
   31877             :     "\n"
   31878             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method\n"
   31879             :     "OGRFeatureDefn::SetStyleIgnored().\n"
   31880             :     "\n"
   31881             :     "Parameters:\n"
   31882             :     "-----------\n"
   31883             :     "\n"
   31884             :     "hDefn:  handle to the feature definition on witch OGRFeature are based\n"
   31885             :     "on.\n"
   31886             :     "\n"
   31887             :     "bIgnore:  ignore state \n"
   31888             :     ""},
   31889             :    { (char *)"FeatureDefn_IsSame", _wrap_FeatureDefn_IsSame, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   31890             :     "FeatureDefn_IsSame(FeatureDefn self, FeatureDefn other_defn) -> int\n"
   31891             :     "\n"
   31892             :     "int OGR_FD_IsSame(OGRFeatureDefnH\n"
   31893             :     "hFDefn, OGRFeatureDefnH hOtherFDefn)\n"
   31894             :     "\n"
   31895             :     "Test if the feature definition is identical to the other one.\n"
   31896             :     "\n"
   31897             :     "Parameters:\n"
   31898             :     "-----------\n"
   31899             :     "\n"
   31900             :     "hFDefn:  handle to the feature definition on witch OGRFeature are\n"
   31901             :     "based on.\n"
   31902             :     "\n"
   31903             :     "hOtherFDefn:  handle to the other feature definition to compare to.\n"
   31904             :     "\n"
   31905             :     "TRUE if the feature definition is identical to the other one.\n"
   31906             :     "\n"
   31907             :     "OGR 1.11 \n"
   31908             :     ""},
   31909             :    { (char *)"FeatureDefn_swigregister", FeatureDefn_swigregister, METH_VARARGS, NULL},
   31910             :    { (char *)"delete_FieldDefn", _wrap_delete_FieldDefn, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"delete_FieldDefn(FieldDefn self)"},
   31911             :    { (char *)"new_FieldDefn", (PyCFunction) _wrap_new_FieldDefn, METH_VARARGS | METH_KEYWORDS, (char *)"new_FieldDefn(char const * name_null_ok, OGRFieldType field_type) -> FieldDefn"},
   31912             :    { (char *)"FieldDefn_GetName", _wrap_FieldDefn_GetName, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"FieldDefn_GetName(FieldDefn self) -> char const *"},
   31913             :    { (char *)"FieldDefn_GetNameRef", _wrap_FieldDefn_GetNameRef, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   31914             :     "FieldDefn_GetNameRef(FieldDefn self) -> char const *\n"
   31915             :     "\n"
   31916             :     "const char*\n"
   31917             :     "OGR_Fld_GetNameRef(OGRFieldDefnH hDefn)\n"
   31918             :     "\n"
   31919             :     "Fetch name of this field.\n"
   31920             :     "\n"
   31921             :     "This function is the same as the CPP method\n"
   31922             :     "OGRFieldDefn::GetNameRef().\n"
   31923             :     "\n"
   31924             :     "Parameters:\n"
   31925             :     "-----------\n"
   31926             :     "\n"
   31927             :     "hDefn:  handle to the field definition.\n"
   31928             :     "\n"
   31929             :     "the name of the field definition. \n"
   31930             :     ""},
   31931             :    { (char *)"FieldDefn_SetName", _wrap_FieldDefn_SetName, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   31932             :     "FieldDefn_SetName(FieldDefn self, char const * name)\n"
   31933             :     "\n"
   31934             :     "void OGR_Fld_SetName(OGRFieldDefnH\n"
   31935             :     "hDefn, const char *pszName)\n"
   31936             :     "\n"
   31937             :     "Reset the name of this field.\n"
   31938             :     "\n"
   31939             :     "This function is the same as the CPP method OGRFieldDefn::SetName().\n"
   31940             :     "\n"
   31941             :     "Parameters:\n"
   31942             :     "-----------\n"
   31943             :     "\n"
   31944             :     "hDefn:  handle to the field definition to apply the new name to.\n"
   31945             :     "\n"
   31946             :     "pszName:  the new name to apply. \n"
   31947             :     ""},
   31948             :    { (char *)"FieldDefn_GetType", _wrap_FieldDefn_GetType, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   31949             :     "FieldDefn_GetType(FieldDefn self) -> OGRFieldType\n"
   31950             :     "\n"
   31951             :     "OGRFieldType\n"
   31952             :     "OGR_Fld_GetType(OGRFieldDefnH hDefn)\n"
   31953             :     "\n"
   31954             :     "Fetch type of this field.\n"
   31955             :     "\n"
   31956             :     "This function is the same as the CPP method OGRFieldDefn::GetType().\n"
   31957             :     "\n"
   31958             :     "Parameters:\n"
   31959             :     "-----------\n"
   31960             :     "\n"
   31961             :     "hDefn:  handle to the field definition to get type from.\n"
   31962             :     "\n"
   31963             :     "field type. \n"
   31964             :     ""},
   31965             :    { (char *)"FieldDefn_SetType", _wrap_FieldDefn_SetType, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   31966             :     "FieldDefn_SetType(FieldDefn self, OGRFieldType type)\n"
   31967             :     "\n"
   31968             :     "void OGR_Fld_SetType(OGRFieldDefnH\n"
   31969             :     "hDefn, OGRFieldType eType)\n"
   31970             :     "\n"
   31971             :     "Set the type of this field.\n"
   31972             :     "\n"
   31973             :     "This should never be done to an OGRFieldDefn that is already part of\n"
   31974             :     "an OGRFeatureDefn.\n"
   31975             :     "\n"
   31976             :     "This function is the same as the CPP method OGRFieldDefn::SetType().\n"
   31977             :     "\n"
   31978             :     "Parameters:\n"
   31979             :     "-----------\n"
   31980             :     "\n"
   31981             :     "hDefn:  handle to the field definition to set type to.\n"
   31982             :     "\n"
   31983             :     "eType:  the new field type. \n"
   31984             :     ""},
   31985             :    { (char *)"FieldDefn_GetSubType", _wrap_FieldDefn_GetSubType, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   31986             :     "FieldDefn_GetSubType(FieldDefn self) -> OGRFieldSubType\n"
   31987             :     "\n"
   31988             :     "OGRFieldSubType\n"
   31989             :     "OGR_Fld_GetSubType(OGRFieldDefnH hDefn)\n"
   31990             :     "\n"
   31991             :     "Fetch subtype of this field.\n"
   31992             :     "\n"
   31993             :     "This function is the same as the CPP method\n"
   31994             :     "OGRFieldDefn::GetSubType().\n"
   31995             :     "\n"
   31996             :     "Parameters:\n"
   31997             :     "-----------\n"
   31998             :     "\n"
   31999             :     "hDefn:  handle to the field definition to get subtype from.\n"
   32000             :     "\n"
   32001             :     "field subtype.\n"
   32002             :     "\n"
   32003             :     "GDAL 2.0 \n"
   32004             :     ""},
   32005             :    { (char *)"FieldDefn_SetSubType", _wrap_FieldDefn_SetSubType, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   32006             :     "FieldDefn_SetSubType(FieldDefn self, OGRFieldSubType type)\n"
   32007             :     "\n"
   32008             :     "void\n"
   32009             :     "OGR_Fld_SetSubType(OGRFieldDefnH hDefn, OGRFieldSubType eSubType)\n"
   32010             :     "\n"
   32011             :     "Set the subtype of this field.\n"
   32012             :     "\n"
   32013             :     "This should never be done to an OGRFieldDefn that is already part of\n"
   32014             :     "an OGRFeatureDefn.\n"
   32015             :     "\n"
   32016             :     "This function is the same as the CPP method\n"
   32017             :     "OGRFieldDefn::SetSubType().\n"
   32018             :     "\n"
   32019             :     "Parameters:\n"
   32020             :     "-----------\n"
   32021             :     "\n"
   32022             :     "hDefn:  handle to the field definition to set type to.\n"
   32023             :     "\n"
   32024             :     "eSubType:  the new field subtype.\n"
   32025             :     "\n"
   32026             :     "GDAL 2.0 \n"
   32027             :     ""},
   32028             :    { (char *)"FieldDefn_GetJustify", _wrap_FieldDefn_GetJustify, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   32029             :     "FieldDefn_GetJustify(FieldDefn self) -> OGRJustification\n"
   32030             :     "\n"
   32031             :     "OGRJustification\n"
   32032             :     "OGR_Fld_GetJustify(OGRFieldDefnH hDefn)\n"
   32033             :     "\n"
   32034             :     "Get the justification for this field.\n"
   32035             :     "\n"
   32036             :     "This function is the same as the CPP method\n"
   32037             :     "OGRFieldDefn::GetJustify().\n"
   32038             :     "\n"
   32039             :     "Note: no driver is know to use the concept of field justification.\n"
   32040             :     "\n"
   32041             :     "Parameters:\n"
   32042             :     "-----------\n"
   32043             :     "\n"
   32044             :     "hDefn:  handle to the field definition to get justification from.\n"
   32045             :     "\n"
   32046             :     "the justification. \n"
   32047             :     ""},
   32048             :    { (char *)"FieldDefn_SetJustify", _wrap_FieldDefn_SetJustify, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   32049             :     "FieldDefn_SetJustify(FieldDefn self, OGRJustification justify)\n"
   32050             :     "\n"
   32051             :     "void\n"
   32052             :     "OGR_Fld_SetJustify(OGRFieldDefnH hDefn, OGRJustification eJustify)\n"
   32053             :     "\n"
   32054             :     "Set the justification for this field.\n"
   32055             :     "\n"
   32056             :     "Note: no driver is know to use the concept of field justification.\n"
   32057             :     "\n"
   32058             :     "This function is the same as the CPP method\n"
   32059             :     "OGRFieldDefn::SetJustify().\n"
   32060             :     "\n"
   32061             :     "Parameters:\n"
   32062             :     "-----------\n"
   32063             :     "\n"
   32064             :     "hDefn:  handle to the field definition to set justification to.\n"
   32065             :     "\n"
   32066             :     "eJustify:  the new justification. \n"
   32067             :     ""},
   32068             :    { (char *)"FieldDefn_GetWidth", _wrap_FieldDefn_GetWidth, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   32069             :     "FieldDefn_GetWidth(FieldDefn self) -> int\n"
   32070             :     "\n"
   32071             :     "int OGR_Fld_GetWidth(OGRFieldDefnH\n"
   32072             :     "hDefn)\n"
   32073             :     "\n"
   32074             :     "Get the formatting width for this field.\n"
   32075             :     "\n"
   32076             :     "This function is the same as the CPP method OGRFieldDefn::GetWidth().\n"
   32077             :     "\n"
   32078             :     "Parameters:\n"
   32079             :     "-----------\n"
   32080             :     "\n"
   32081             :     "hDefn:  handle to the field definition to get width from.\n"
   32082             :     "\n"
   32083             :     "the width, zero means no specified width. \n"
   32084             :     ""},
   32085             :    { (char *)"FieldDefn_SetWidth", _wrap_FieldDefn_SetWidth, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   32086             :     "FieldDefn_SetWidth(FieldDefn self, int width)\n"
   32087             :     "\n"
   32088             :     "void OGR_Fld_SetWidth(OGRFieldDefnH\n"
   32089             :     "hDefn, int nNewWidth)\n"
   32090             :     "\n"
   32091             :     "Set the formatting width for this field in characters.\n"
   32092             :     "\n"
   32093             :     "This function is the same as the CPP method OGRFieldDefn::SetWidth().\n"
   32094             :     "\n"
   32095             :     "Parameters:\n"
   32096             :     "-----------\n"
   32097             :     "\n"
   32098             :     "hDefn:  handle to the field definition to set width to.\n"
   32099             :     "\n"
   32100             :     "nNewWidth:  the new width. \n"
   32101             :     ""},
   32102             :    { (char *)"FieldDefn_GetPrecision", _wrap_FieldDefn_GetPrecision, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   32103             :     "FieldDefn_GetPrecision(FieldDefn self) -> int\n"
   32104             :     "\n"
   32105             :     "int\n"
   32106             :     "OGR_Fld_GetPrecision(OGRFieldDefnH hDefn)\n"
   32107             :     "\n"
   32108             :     "Get the formatting precision for this field.\n"
   32109             :     "\n"
   32110             :     "This should normally be zero for fields of types other than OFTReal.\n"
   32111             :     "\n"
   32112             :     "This function is the same as the CPP method\n"
   32113             :     "OGRFieldDefn::GetPrecision().\n"
   32114             :     "\n"
   32115             :     "Parameters:\n"
   32116             :     "-----------\n"
   32117             :     "\n"
   32118             :     "hDefn:  handle to the field definition to get precision from.\n"
   32119             :     "\n"
   32120             :     "the precision. \n"
   32121             :     ""},
   32122             :    { (char *)"FieldDefn_SetPrecision", _wrap_FieldDefn_SetPrecision, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   32123             :     "FieldDefn_SetPrecision(FieldDefn self, int precision)\n"
   32124             :     "\n"
   32125             :     "void\n"
   32126             :     "OGR_Fld_SetPrecision(OGRFieldDefnH hDefn, int nPrecision)\n"
   32127             :     "\n"
   32128             :     "Set the formatting precision for this field in characters.\n"
   32129             :     "\n"
   32130             :     "This should normally be zero for fields of types other than OFTReal.\n"
   32131             :     "\n"
   32132             :     "This function is the same as the CPP method\n"
   32133             :     "OGRFieldDefn::SetPrecision().\n"
   32134             :     "\n"
   32135             :     "Parameters:\n"
   32136             :     "-----------\n"
   32137             :     "\n"
   32138             :     "hDefn:  handle to the field definition to set precision to.\n"
   32139             :     "\n"
   32140             :     "nPrecision:  the new precision. \n"
   32141             :     ""},
   32142             :    { (char *)"FieldDefn_GetTypeName", _wrap_FieldDefn_GetTypeName, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"FieldDefn_GetTypeName(FieldDefn self) -> char const *"},
   32143             :    { (char *)"FieldDefn_GetFieldTypeName", _wrap_FieldDefn_GetFieldTypeName, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"FieldDefn_GetFieldTypeName(FieldDefn self, OGRFieldType type) -> char const *"},
   32144             :    { (char *)"FieldDefn_IsIgnored", _wrap_FieldDefn_IsIgnored, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   32145             :     "FieldDefn_IsIgnored(FieldDefn self) -> int\n"
   32146             :     "\n"
   32147             :     "int OGR_Fld_IsIgnored(OGRFieldDefnH\n"
   32148             :     "hDefn)\n"
   32149             :     "\n"
   32150             :     "Return whether this field should be omitted when fetching features.\n"
   32151             :     "\n"
   32152             :     "This method is the same as the C++ method OGRFieldDefn::IsIgnored().\n"
   32153             :     "\n"
   32154             :     "Parameters:\n"
   32155             :     "-----------\n"
   32156             :     "\n"
   32157             :     "hDefn:  handle to the field definition\n"
   32158             :     "\n"
   32159             :     "ignore state \n"
   32160             :     ""},
   32161             :    { (char *)"FieldDefn_SetIgnored", _wrap_FieldDefn_SetIgnored, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   32162             :     "FieldDefn_SetIgnored(FieldDefn self, int bIgnored)\n"
   32163             :     "\n"
   32164             :     "void\n"
   32165             :     "OGR_Fld_SetIgnored(OGRFieldDefnH hDefn, int ignore)\n"
   32166             :     "\n"
   32167             :     "Set whether this field should be omitted when fetching features.\n"
   32168             :     "\n"
   32169             :     "This method is the same as the C++ method OGRFieldDefn::SetIgnored().\n"
   32170             :     "\n"
   32171             :     "Parameters:\n"
   32172             :     "-----------\n"
   32173             :     "\n"
   32174             :     "hDefn:  handle to the field definition\n"
   32175             :     "\n"
   32176             :     "ignore:  ignore state \n"
   32177             :     ""},
   32178             :    { (char *)"FieldDefn_IsNullable", _wrap_FieldDefn_IsNullable, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   32179             :     "FieldDefn_IsNullable(FieldDefn self) -> int\n"
   32180             :     "\n"
   32181             :     "int\n"
   32182             :     "OGR_Fld_IsNullable(OGRFieldDefnH hDefn)\n"
   32183             :     "\n"
   32184             :     "Return whether this field can receive null values.\n"
   32185             :     "\n"
   32186             :     "By default, fields are nullable.\n"
   32187             :     "\n"
   32188             :     "Even if this method returns FALSE (i.e not-nullable field), it doesn't\n"
   32189             :     "mean that OGRFeature::IsFieldSet() will necessary return TRUE, as\n"
   32190             :     "fields can be temporary unset and null /not-null validation is usually\n"
   32191             :     "done when OGRLayer::CreateFeature()/SetFeature() is called.\n"
   32192             :     "\n"
   32193             :     "This method is the same as the C++ method OGRFieldDefn::IsNullable().\n"
   32194             :     "\n"
   32195             :     "Parameters:\n"
   32196             :     "-----------\n"
   32197             :     "\n"
   32198             :     "hDefn:  handle to the field definition\n"
   32199             :     "\n"
   32200             :     "TRUE if the field is authorized to be null.\n"
   32201             :     "\n"
   32202             :     "GDAL 2.0 \n"
   32203             :     ""},
   32204             :    { (char *)"FieldDefn_SetNullable", _wrap_FieldDefn_SetNullable, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   32205             :     "FieldDefn_SetNullable(FieldDefn self, int bNullable)\n"
   32206             :     "\n"
   32207             :     "void\n"
   32208             :     "OGR_Fld_SetNullable(OGRFieldDefnH hDefn, int bNullableIn)\n"
   32209             :     "\n"
   32210             :     "Set whether this field can receive null values.\n"
   32211             :     "\n"
   32212             :     "By default, fields are nullable, so this method is generally called\n"
   32213             :     "with FALSE to set a not-null constraint.\n"
   32214             :     "\n"
   32215             :     "Drivers that support writing not-null constraint will advertize the\n"
   32216             :     "GDAL_DCAP_NOTNULL_FIELDS driver metadata item.\n"
   32217             :     "\n"
   32218             :     "This method is the same as the C++ method OGRFieldDefn::SetNullable().\n"
   32219             :     "\n"
   32220             :     "Parameters:\n"
   32221             :     "-----------\n"
   32222             :     "\n"
   32223             :     "hDefn:  handle to the field definition\n"
   32224             :     "\n"
   32225             :     "bNullableIn:  FALSE if the field must have a not-null constraint.\n"
   32226             :     "\n"
   32227             :     "GDAL 2.0 \n"
   32228             :     ""},
   32229             :    { (char *)"FieldDefn_GetDefault", _wrap_FieldDefn_GetDefault, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   32230             :     "FieldDefn_GetDefault(FieldDefn self) -> char const *\n"
   32231             :     "\n"
   32232             :     "const char*\n"
   32233             :     "OGR_Fld_GetDefault(OGRFieldDefnH hDefn)\n"
   32234             :     "\n"
   32235             :     "Get default field value.\n"
   32236             :     "\n"
   32237             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method\n"
   32238             :     "OGRFieldDefn::GetDefault().\n"
   32239             :     "\n"
   32240             :     "Parameters:\n"
   32241             :     "-----------\n"
   32242             :     "\n"
   32243             :     "hDefn:  handle to the field definition.\n"
   32244             :     "\n"
   32245             :     "default field value or NULL.\n"
   32246             :     "\n"
   32247             :     "GDAL 2.0 \n"
   32248             :     ""},
   32249             :    { (char *)"FieldDefn_SetDefault", _wrap_FieldDefn_SetDefault, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   32250             :     "FieldDefn_SetDefault(FieldDefn self, char const * pszValue)\n"
   32251             :     "\n"
   32252             :     "void\n"
   32253             :     "OGR_Fld_SetDefault(OGRFieldDefnH hDefn, const char *pszDefault)\n"
   32254             :     "\n"
   32255             :     "Set default field value.\n"
   32256             :     "\n"
   32257             :     "The default field value is taken into account by drivers (generally\n"
   32258             :     "those with a SQL interface) that support it at field creation time.\n"
   32259             :     "OGR will generally not automatically set the default field value to\n"
   32260             :     "null fields by itself when calling OGRFeature::CreateFeature() /\n"
   32261             :     "OGRFeature::SetFeature(), but will let the low-level layers to do the\n"
   32262             :     "job. So retrieving the feature from the layer is recommended.\n"
   32263             :     "\n"
   32264             :     "The accepted values are NULL, a numeric value, a literal value\n"
   32265             :     "enclosed between single quote characters (and inner single quote\n"
   32266             :     "characters escaped by repetition of the single quote character),\n"
   32267             :     "CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIME, CURRENT_DATE or a driver specific\n"
   32268             :     "expression (that might be ignored by other drivers). For a datetime\n"
   32269             :     "literal value, format should be 'YYYY/MM/DD HH:MM:SS[.sss]'\n"
   32270             :     "(considered as UTC time).\n"
   32271             :     "\n"
   32272             :     "Drivers that support writing DEFAULT clauses will advertize the\n"
   32273             :     "GDAL_DCAP_DEFAULT_FIELDS driver metadata item.\n"
   32274             :     "\n"
   32275             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method\n"
   32276             :     "OGRFieldDefn::SetDefault().\n"
   32277             :     "\n"
   32278             :     "Parameters:\n"
   32279             :     "-----------\n"
   32280             :     "\n"
   32281             :     "hDefn:  handle to the field definition.\n"
   32282             :     "\n"
   32283             :     "pszDefault:  new default field value or NULL pointer.\n"
   32284             :     "\n"
   32285             :     "GDAL 2.0 \n"
   32286             :     ""},
   32287             :    { (char *)"FieldDefn_IsDefaultDriverSpecific", _wrap_FieldDefn_IsDefaultDriverSpecific, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   32288             :     "FieldDefn_IsDefaultDriverSpecific(FieldDefn self) -> int\n"
   32289             :     "\n"
   32290             :     "int\n"
   32291             :     "OGR_Fld_IsDefaultDriverSpecific(OGRFieldDefnH hDefn)\n"
   32292             :     "\n"
   32293             :     "Returns whether the default value is driver specific.\n"
   32294             :     "\n"
   32295             :     "Driver specific default values are those that are not NULL, a numeric\n"
   32296             :     "value, a literal value enclosed between single quote characters,\n"
   32297             :     "CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIME, CURRENT_DATE or datetime literal\n"
   32298             :     "value.\n"
   32299             :     "\n"
   32300             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method\n"
   32301             :     "OGRFieldDefn::IsDefaultDriverSpecific().\n"
   32302             :     "\n"
   32303             :     "Parameters:\n"
   32304             :     "-----------\n"
   32305             :     "\n"
   32306             :     "hDefn:  handle to the field definition\n"
   32307             :     "\n"
   32308             :     "TRUE if the default value is driver specific.\n"
   32309             :     "\n"
   32310             :     "GDAL 2.0 \n"
   32311             :     ""},
   32312             :    { (char *)"FieldDefn_swigregister", FieldDefn_swigregister, METH_VARARGS, NULL},
   32313             :    { (char *)"delete_GeomFieldDefn", _wrap_delete_GeomFieldDefn, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"delete_GeomFieldDefn(GeomFieldDefn self)"},
   32314             :    { (char *)"new_GeomFieldDefn", (PyCFunction) _wrap_new_GeomFieldDefn, METH_VARARGS | METH_KEYWORDS, (char *)"new_GeomFieldDefn(char const * name_null_ok, OGRwkbGeometryType field_type) -> GeomFieldDefn"},
   32315             :    { (char *)"GeomFieldDefn_GetName", _wrap_GeomFieldDefn_GetName, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"GeomFieldDefn_GetName(GeomFieldDefn self) -> char const *"},
   32316             :    { (char *)"GeomFieldDefn_GetNameRef", _wrap_GeomFieldDefn_GetNameRef, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"GeomFieldDefn_GetNameRef(GeomFieldDefn self) -> char const *"},
   32317             :    { (char *)"GeomFieldDefn_SetName", _wrap_GeomFieldDefn_SetName, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"GeomFieldDefn_SetName(GeomFieldDefn self, char const * name)"},
   32318             :    { (char *)"GeomFieldDefn_GetType", _wrap_GeomFieldDefn_GetType, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"GeomFieldDefn_GetType(GeomFieldDefn self) -> OGRwkbGeometryType"},
   32319             :    { (char *)"GeomFieldDefn_SetType", _wrap_GeomFieldDefn_SetType, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"GeomFieldDefn_SetType(GeomFieldDefn self, OGRwkbGeometryType type)"},
   32320             :    { (char *)"GeomFieldDefn_GetSpatialRef", _wrap_GeomFieldDefn_GetSpatialRef, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"GeomFieldDefn_GetSpatialRef(GeomFieldDefn self) -> SpatialReference"},
   32321             :    { (char *)"GeomFieldDefn_SetSpatialRef", _wrap_GeomFieldDefn_SetSpatialRef, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"GeomFieldDefn_SetSpatialRef(GeomFieldDefn self, SpatialReference srs)"},
   32322             :    { (char *)"GeomFieldDefn_IsIgnored", _wrap_GeomFieldDefn_IsIgnored, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"GeomFieldDefn_IsIgnored(GeomFieldDefn self) -> int"},
   32323             :    { (char *)"GeomFieldDefn_SetIgnored", _wrap_GeomFieldDefn_SetIgnored, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"GeomFieldDefn_SetIgnored(GeomFieldDefn self, int bIgnored)"},
   32324             :    { (char *)"GeomFieldDefn_IsNullable", _wrap_GeomFieldDefn_IsNullable, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"GeomFieldDefn_IsNullable(GeomFieldDefn self) -> int"},
   32325             :    { (char *)"GeomFieldDefn_SetNullable", _wrap_GeomFieldDefn_SetNullable, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"GeomFieldDefn_SetNullable(GeomFieldDefn self, int bNullable)"},
   32326             :    { (char *)"GeomFieldDefn_swigregister", GeomFieldDefn_swigregister, METH_VARARGS, NULL},
   32327             :    { (char *)"CreateGeometryFromWkb", (PyCFunction) _wrap_CreateGeometryFromWkb, METH_VARARGS | METH_KEYWORDS, (char *)"CreateGeometryFromWkb(int len, SpatialReference reference=None) -> Geometry"},
   32328             :    { (char *)"CreateGeometryFromWkt", (PyCFunction) _wrap_CreateGeometryFromWkt, METH_VARARGS | METH_KEYWORDS, (char *)"CreateGeometryFromWkt(char ** val, SpatialReference reference=None) -> Geometry"},
   32329             :    { (char *)"CreateGeometryFromGML", _wrap_CreateGeometryFromGML, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"CreateGeometryFromGML(char const * input_string) -> Geometry"},
   32330             :    { (char *)"CreateGeometryFromJson", _wrap_CreateGeometryFromJson, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"CreateGeometryFromJson(char const * input_string) -> Geometry"},
   32331             :    { (char *)"BuildPolygonFromEdges", (PyCFunction) _wrap_BuildPolygonFromEdges, METH_VARARGS | METH_KEYWORDS, (char *)"BuildPolygonFromEdges(Geometry hLineCollection, int bBestEffort=0, int bAutoClose=0, double dfTolerance=0) -> Geometry"},
   32332             :    { (char *)"ApproximateArcAngles", (PyCFunction) _wrap_ApproximateArcAngles, METH_VARARGS | METH_KEYWORDS, (char *)"ApproximateArcAngles(double dfCenterX, double dfCenterY, double dfZ, double dfPrimaryRadius, double dfSecondaryAxis, double dfRotation, double dfStartAngle, double dfEndAngle, double dfMaxAngleStepSizeDegrees) -> Geometry"},
   32333             :    { (char *)"ForceToPolygon", _wrap_ForceToPolygon, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"ForceToPolygon(Geometry geom_in) -> Geometry"},
   32334             :    { (char *)"ForceToLineString", _wrap_ForceToLineString, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"ForceToLineString(Geometry geom_in) -> Geometry"},
   32335             :    { (char *)"ForceToMultiPolygon", _wrap_ForceToMultiPolygon, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"ForceToMultiPolygon(Geometry geom_in) -> Geometry"},
   32336             :    { (char *)"ForceToMultiPoint", _wrap_ForceToMultiPoint, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"ForceToMultiPoint(Geometry geom_in) -> Geometry"},
   32337             :    { (char *)"ForceToMultiLineString", _wrap_ForceToMultiLineString, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"ForceToMultiLineString(Geometry geom_in) -> Geometry"},
   32338             :    { (char *)"ForceTo", _wrap_ForceTo, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"ForceTo(Geometry geom_in, OGRwkbGeometryType eTargetType, char ** options=None) -> Geometry"},
   32339             :    { (char *)"delete_Geometry", _wrap_delete_Geometry, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"delete_Geometry(Geometry self)"},
   32340             :    { (char *)"new_Geometry", (PyCFunction) _wrap_new_Geometry, METH_VARARGS | METH_KEYWORDS, (char *)"new_Geometry(OGRwkbGeometryType type, char * wkt=None, int wkb=0, char * gml=None) -> Geometry"},
   32341             :    { (char *)"Geometry_ExportToWkt", _wrap_Geometry_ExportToWkt, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   32342             :     "Geometry_ExportToWkt(Geometry self) -> OGRErr\n"
   32343             :     "\n"
   32344             :     "OGRErr\n"
   32345             :     "OGR_G_ExportToWkt(OGRGeometryH hGeom, char **ppszSrcText)\n"
   32346             :     "\n"
   32347             :     "Convert a geometry into well known text format.\n"
   32348             :     "\n"
   32349             :     "This function relates to the SFCOM IWks::ExportToWKT() method.\n"
   32350             :     "\n"
   32351             :     "For backward compatibility purposes, it exports the Old-style 99-402\n"
   32352             :     "extended dimension (Z) WKB types for types Point, LineString, Polygon,\n"
   32353             :     "MultiPoint, MultiLineString, MultiPolygon and GeometryCollection. For\n"
   32354             :     "other geometry types, it is equivalent to OGR_G_ExportToIsoWkt().\n"
   32355             :     "\n"
   32356             :     "This function is the same as the CPP method\n"
   32357             :     "OGRGeometry::exportToWkt().\n"
   32358             :     "\n"
   32359             :     "Parameters:\n"
   32360             :     "-----------\n"
   32361             :     "\n"
   32362             :     "hGeom:  handle on the geometry to convert to a text format from.\n"
   32363             :     "\n"
   32364             :     "ppszSrcText:  a text buffer is allocated by the program, and assigned\n"
   32365             :     "to the passed pointer. After use, *ppszDstText should be freed with\n"
   32366             :     "CPLFree().\n"
   32367             :     "\n"
   32368             :     "Currently OGRERR_NONE is always returned. \n"
   32369             :     ""},
   32370             :    { (char *)"Geometry_ExportToIsoWkt", _wrap_Geometry_ExportToIsoWkt, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   32371             :     "Geometry_ExportToIsoWkt(Geometry self) -> OGRErr\n"
   32372             :     "\n"
   32373             :     "OGRErr\n"
   32374             :     "OGR_G_ExportToIsoWkt(OGRGeometryH hGeom, char **ppszSrcText)\n"
   32375             :     "\n"
   32376             :     "Convert a geometry into SFSQL 1.2 / ISO SQL/MM Part 3 well known text\n"
   32377             :     "format.\n"
   32378             :     "\n"
   32379             :     "This function relates to the SFCOM IWks::ExportToWKT() method. It\n"
   32380             :     "exports the SFSQL 1.2 and ISO SQL/MM Part 3 extended dimension (Z&M)\n"
   32381             :     "WKB types.\n"
   32382             :     "\n"
   32383             :     "This function is the same as the CPP method\n"
   32384             :     "OGRGeometry::exportToWkt(wkbVariantIso).\n"
   32385             :     "\n"
   32386             :     "Parameters:\n"
   32387             :     "-----------\n"
   32388             :     "\n"
   32389             :     "hGeom:  handle on the geometry to convert to a text format from.\n"
   32390             :     "\n"
   32391             :     "ppszSrcText:  a text buffer is allocated by the program, and assigned\n"
   32392             :     "to the passed pointer. After use, *ppszDstText should be freed with\n"
   32393             :     "CPLFree().\n"
   32394             :     "\n"
   32395             :     "Currently OGRERR_NONE is always returned.\n"
   32396             :     "\n"
   32397             :     "GDAL 2.0 \n"
   32398             :     ""},
   32399             :    { (char *)"Geometry_ExportToWkb", (PyCFunction) _wrap_Geometry_ExportToWkb, METH_VARARGS | METH_KEYWORDS, (char *)"\n"
   32400             :     "Geometry_ExportToWkb(Geometry self, OGRwkbByteOrder byte_order) -> OGRErr\n"
   32401             :     "\n"
   32402             :     "OGRErr\n"
   32403             :     "OGR_G_ExportToWkb(OGRGeometryH hGeom, OGRwkbByteOrder eOrder, unsigned\n"
   32404             :     "char *pabyDstBuffer)\n"
   32405             :     "\n"
   32406             :     "Convert a geometry well known binary format.\n"
   32407             :     "\n"
   32408             :     "This function relates to the SFCOM IWks::ExportToWKB() method.\n"
   32409             :     "\n"
   32410             :     "For backward compatibility purposes, it exports the Old-style 99-402\n"
   32411             :     "extended dimension (Z) WKB types for types Point, LineString, Polygon,\n"
   32412             :     "MultiPoint, MultiLineString, MultiPolygon and GeometryCollection. For\n"
   32413             :     "other geometry types, it is equivalent to OGR_G_ExportToIsoWkb().\n"
   32414             :     "\n"
   32415             :     "This function is the same as the CPP method\n"
   32416             :     "OGRGeometry::exportToWkb(OGRwkbByteOrder, unsigned char *,\n"
   32417             :     "OGRwkbVariant) with eWkbVariant = wkbVariantOldOgc.\n"
   32418             :     "\n"
   32419             :     "Parameters:\n"
   32420             :     "-----------\n"
   32421             :     "\n"
   32422             :     "hGeom:  handle on the geometry to convert to a well know binary data\n"
   32423             :     "from.\n"
   32424             :     "\n"
   32425             :     "eOrder:  One of wkbXDR or wkbNDR indicating MSB or LSB byte order\n"
   32426             :     "respectively.\n"
   32427             :     "\n"
   32428             :     "pabyDstBuffer:  a buffer into which the binary representation is\n"
   32429             :     "written. This buffer must be at least OGR_G_WkbSize() byte in size.\n"
   32430             :     "\n"
   32431             :     "Currently OGRERR_NONE is always returned. \n"
   32432             :     ""},
   32433             :    { (char *)"Geometry_ExportToIsoWkb", (PyCFunction) _wrap_Geometry_ExportToIsoWkb, METH_VARARGS | METH_KEYWORDS, (char *)"\n"
   32434             :     "Geometry_ExportToIsoWkb(Geometry self, OGRwkbByteOrder byte_order) -> OGRErr\n"
   32435             :     "\n"
   32436             :     "OGRErr\n"
   32437             :     "OGR_G_ExportToIsoWkb(OGRGeometryH hGeom, OGRwkbByteOrder eOrder,\n"
   32438             :     "unsigned char *pabyDstBuffer)\n"
   32439             :     "\n"
   32440             :     "Convert a geometry into SFSQL 1.2 / ISO SQL/MM Part 3 well known\n"
   32441             :     "binary format.\n"
   32442             :     "\n"
   32443             :     "This function relates to the SFCOM IWks::ExportToWKB() method. It\n"
   32444             :     "exports the SFSQL 1.2 and ISO SQL/MM Part 3 extended dimension (Z&M)\n"
   32445             :     "WKB types.\n"
   32446             :     "\n"
   32447             :     "This function is the same as the CPP method\n"
   32448             :     "OGRGeometry::exportToWkb(OGRwkbByteOrder, unsigned char *,\n"
   32449             :     "OGRwkbVariant) with eWkbVariant = wkbVariantIso.\n"
   32450             :     "\n"
   32451             :     "Parameters:\n"
   32452             :     "-----------\n"
   32453             :     "\n"
   32454             :     "hGeom:  handle on the geometry to convert to a well know binary data\n"
   32455             :     "from.\n"
   32456             :     "\n"
   32457             :     "eOrder:  One of wkbXDR or wkbNDR indicating MSB or LSB byte order\n"
   32458             :     "respectively.\n"
   32459             :     "\n"
   32460             :     "pabyDstBuffer:  a buffer into which the binary representation is\n"
   32461             :     "written. This buffer must be at least OGR_G_WkbSize() byte in size.\n"
   32462             :     "\n"
   32463             :     "Currently OGRERR_NONE is always returned.\n"
   32464             :     "\n"
   32465             :     "GDAL 2.0 \n"
   32466             :     ""},
   32467             :    { (char *)"Geometry_ExportToGML", (PyCFunction) _wrap_Geometry_ExportToGML, METH_VARARGS | METH_KEYWORDS, (char *)"Geometry_ExportToGML(Geometry self, char ** options=None) -> retStringAndCPLFree *"},
   32468             :    { (char *)"Geometry_ExportToKML", _wrap_Geometry_ExportToKML, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"Geometry_ExportToKML(Geometry self, char const * altitude_mode=None) -> retStringAndCPLFree *"},
   32469             :    { (char *)"Geometry_ExportToJson", (PyCFunction) _wrap_Geometry_ExportToJson, METH_VARARGS | METH_KEYWORDS, (char *)"Geometry_ExportToJson(Geometry self, char ** options=None) -> retStringAndCPLFree *"},
   32470             :    { (char *)"Geometry_AddPoint", (PyCFunction) _wrap_Geometry_AddPoint, METH_VARARGS | METH_KEYWORDS, (char *)"Geometry_AddPoint(Geometry self, double x, double y, double z=0)"},
   32471             :    { (char *)"Geometry_AddPointM", (PyCFunction) _wrap_Geometry_AddPointM, METH_VARARGS | METH_KEYWORDS, (char *)"Geometry_AddPointM(Geometry self, double x, double y, double m)"},
   32472             :    { (char *)"Geometry_AddPointZM", (PyCFunction) _wrap_Geometry_AddPointZM, METH_VARARGS | METH_KEYWORDS, (char *)"Geometry_AddPointZM(Geometry self, double x, double y, double z, double m)"},
   32473             :    { (char *)"Geometry_AddPoint_2D", _wrap_Geometry_AddPoint_2D, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"Geometry_AddPoint_2D(Geometry self, double x, double y)"},
   32474             :    { (char *)"Geometry_AddGeometryDirectly", _wrap_Geometry_AddGeometryDirectly, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"Geometry_AddGeometryDirectly(Geometry self, Geometry other_disown) -> OGRErr"},
   32475             :    { (char *)"Geometry_AddGeometry", _wrap_Geometry_AddGeometry, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"Geometry_AddGeometry(Geometry self, Geometry other) -> OGRErr"},
   32476             :    { (char *)"Geometry_RemoveGeometry", _wrap_Geometry_RemoveGeometry, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"Geometry_RemoveGeometry(Geometry self, int iSubGeom) -> OGRErr"},
   32477             :    { (char *)"Geometry_Clone", _wrap_Geometry_Clone, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   32478             :     "Geometry_Clone(Geometry self) -> Geometry\n"
   32479             :     "\n"
   32480             :     "OGRGeometryH OGR_G_Clone(OGRGeometryH\n"
   32481             :     "hGeom)\n"
   32482             :     "\n"
   32483             :     "Make a copy of this object.\n"
   32484             :     "\n"
   32485             :     "This function relates to the SFCOM IGeometry::clone() method.\n"
   32486             :     "\n"
   32487             :     "This function is the same as the CPP method OGRGeometry::clone().\n"
   32488             :     "\n"
   32489             :     "Parameters:\n"
   32490             :     "-----------\n"
   32491             :     "\n"
   32492             :     "hGeom:  handle on the geometry to clone from.\n"
   32493             :     "\n"
   32494             :     "an handle on the copy of the geometry with the spatial reference\n"
   32495             :     "system as the original. \n"
   32496             :     ""},
   32497             :    { (char *)"Geometry_GetGeometryType", _wrap_Geometry_GetGeometryType, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   32498             :     "Geometry_GetGeometryType(Geometry self) -> OGRwkbGeometryType\n"
   32499             :     "\n"
   32500             :     "OGRwkbGeometryType\n"
   32501             :     "OGR_G_GetGeometryType(OGRGeometryH hGeom)\n"
   32502             :     "\n"
   32503             :     "Fetch geometry type.\n"
   32504             :     "\n"
   32505             :     "Note that the geometry type may include the 2.5D flag. To get a 2D\n"
   32506             :     "flattened version of the geometry type apply the wkbFlatten() macro to\n"
   32507             :     "the return result.\n"
   32508             :     "\n"
   32509             :     "This function is the same as the CPP method\n"
   32510             :     "OGRGeometry::getGeometryType().\n"
   32511             :     "\n"
   32512             :     "Parameters:\n"
   32513             :     "-----------\n"
   32514             :     "\n"
   32515             :     "hGeom:  handle on the geometry to get type from.\n"
   32516             :     "\n"
   32517             :     "the geometry type code. \n"
   32518             :     ""},
   32519             :    { (char *)"Geometry_GetGeometryName", _wrap_Geometry_GetGeometryName, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   32520             :     "Geometry_GetGeometryName(Geometry self) -> char const *\n"
   32521             :     "\n"
   32522             :     "const char*\n"
   32523             :     "OGR_G_GetGeometryName(OGRGeometryH hGeom)\n"
   32524             :     "\n"
   32525             :     "Fetch WKT name for geometry type.\n"
   32526             :     "\n"
   32527             :     "There is no SFCOM analog to this function.\n"
   32528             :     "\n"
   32529             :     "This function is the same as the CPP method\n"
   32530             :     "OGRGeometry::getGeometryName().\n"
   32531             :     "\n"
   32532             :     "Parameters:\n"
   32533             :     "-----------\n"
   32534             :     "\n"
   32535             :     "hGeom:  handle on the geometry to get name from.\n"
   32536             :     "\n"
   32537             :     "name used for this geometry type in well known text format. \n"
   32538             :     ""},
   32539             :    { (char *)"Geometry_Length", _wrap_Geometry_Length, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"Geometry_Length(Geometry self) -> double"},
   32540             :    { (char *)"Geometry_Area", _wrap_Geometry_Area, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"Geometry_Area(Geometry self) -> double"},
   32541             :    { (char *)"Geometry_GetArea", _wrap_Geometry_GetArea, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"Geometry_GetArea(Geometry self) -> double"},
   32542             :    { (char *)"Geometry_GetPointCount", _wrap_Geometry_GetPointCount, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"Geometry_GetPointCount(Geometry self) -> int"},
   32543             :    { (char *)"Geometry_GetPoints", (PyCFunction) _wrap_Geometry_GetPoints, METH_VARARGS | METH_KEYWORDS, (char *)"Geometry_GetPoints(Geometry self, int nCoordDimension=0)"},
   32544             :    { (char *)"Geometry_GetX", (PyCFunction) _wrap_Geometry_GetX, METH_VARARGS | METH_KEYWORDS, (char *)"Geometry_GetX(Geometry self, int point=0) -> double"},
   32545             :    { (char *)"Geometry_GetY", (PyCFunction) _wrap_Geometry_GetY, METH_VARARGS | METH_KEYWORDS, (char *)"Geometry_GetY(Geometry self, int point=0) -> double"},
   32546             :    { (char *)"Geometry_GetZ", (PyCFunction) _wrap_Geometry_GetZ, METH_VARARGS | METH_KEYWORDS, (char *)"Geometry_GetZ(Geometry self, int point=0) -> double"},
   32547             :    { (char *)"Geometry_GetM", (PyCFunction) _wrap_Geometry_GetM, METH_VARARGS | METH_KEYWORDS, (char *)"Geometry_GetM(Geometry self, int point=0) -> double"},
   32548             :    { (char *)"Geometry_GetPoint", _wrap_Geometry_GetPoint, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"Geometry_GetPoint(Geometry self, int iPoint=0)"},
   32549             :    { (char *)"Geometry_GetPointZM", _wrap_Geometry_GetPointZM, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"Geometry_GetPointZM(Geometry self, int iPoint=0)"},
   32550             :    { (char *)"Geometry_GetPoint_2D", _wrap_Geometry_GetPoint_2D, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"Geometry_GetPoint_2D(Geometry self, int iPoint=0)"},
   32551             :    { (char *)"Geometry_GetGeometryCount", _wrap_Geometry_GetGeometryCount, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"Geometry_GetGeometryCount(Geometry self) -> int"},
   32552             :    { (char *)"Geometry_SetPoint", (PyCFunction) _wrap_Geometry_SetPoint, METH_VARARGS | METH_KEYWORDS, (char *)"Geometry_SetPoint(Geometry self, int point, double x, double y, double z=0)"},
   32553             :    { (char *)"Geometry_SetPointM", (PyCFunction) _wrap_Geometry_SetPointM, METH_VARARGS | METH_KEYWORDS, (char *)"Geometry_SetPointM(Geometry self, int point, double x, double y, double m)"},
   32554             :    { (char *)"Geometry_SetPointZM", (PyCFunction) _wrap_Geometry_SetPointZM, METH_VARARGS | METH_KEYWORDS, (char *)"Geometry_SetPointZM(Geometry self, int point, double x, double y, double z, double m)"},
   32555             :    { (char *)"Geometry_SetPoint_2D", (PyCFunction) _wrap_Geometry_SetPoint_2D, METH_VARARGS | METH_KEYWORDS, (char *)"Geometry_SetPoint_2D(Geometry self, int point, double x, double y)"},
   32556             :    { (char *)"Geometry_SwapXY", _wrap_Geometry_SwapXY, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   32557             :     "Geometry_SwapXY(Geometry self)\n"
   32558             :     "\n"
   32559             :     "void OGR_G_SwapXY(OGRGeometryH hGeom)\n"
   32560             :     "\n"
   32561             :     "Swap x and y coordinates.\n"
   32562             :     "\n"
   32563             :     "Parameters:\n"
   32564             :     "-----------\n"
   32565             :     "\n"
   32566             :     "hGeom:  geometry.\n"
   32567             :     "\n"
   32568             :     "OGR 2.3.0 \n"
   32569             :     ""},
   32570             :    { (char *)"Geometry_GetGeometryRef", _wrap_Geometry_GetGeometryRef, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"Geometry_GetGeometryRef(Geometry self, int geom) -> Geometry"},
   32571             :    { (char *)"Geometry_Simplify", _wrap_Geometry_Simplify, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   32572             :     "Geometry_Simplify(Geometry self, double tolerance) -> Geometry\n"
   32573             :     "\n"
   32574             :     "OGRGeometryH\n"
   32575             :     "OGR_G_Simplify(OGRGeometryH hThis, double dTolerance)\n"
   32576             :     "\n"
   32577             :     "Compute a simplified geometry.\n"
   32578             :     "\n"
   32579             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method OGRGeometry::Simplify().\n"
   32580             :     "\n"
   32581             :     "This function is built on the GEOS library, check it for the\n"
   32582             :     "definition of the geometry operation. If OGR is built without the GEOS\n"
   32583             :     "library, this function will always fail, issuing a CPLE_NotSupported\n"
   32584             :     "error.\n"
   32585             :     "\n"
   32586             :     "Parameters:\n"
   32587             :     "-----------\n"
   32588             :     "\n"
   32589             :     "hThis:  the geometry.\n"
   32590             :     "\n"
   32591             :     "dTolerance:  the distance tolerance for the simplification.\n"
   32592             :     "\n"
   32593             :     "the simplified geometry or NULL if an error occurs.\n"
   32594             :     "\n"
   32595             :     "OGR 1.8.0 \n"
   32596             :     ""},
   32597             :    { (char *)"Geometry_SimplifyPreserveTopology", _wrap_Geometry_SimplifyPreserveTopology, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   32598             :     "Geometry_SimplifyPreserveTopology(Geometry self, double tolerance) -> Geometry\n"
   32599             :     "\n"
   32600             :     "OGRGeometryH\n"
   32601             :     "OGR_G_SimplifyPreserveTopology(OGRGeometryH hThis, double dTolerance)\n"
   32602             :     "\n"
   32603             :     "Simplify the geometry while preserving topology.\n"
   32604             :     "\n"
   32605             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method\n"
   32606             :     "OGRGeometry::SimplifyPreserveTopology().\n"
   32607             :     "\n"
   32608             :     "This function is built on the GEOS library, check it for the\n"
   32609             :     "definition of the geometry operation. If OGR is built without the GEOS\n"
   32610             :     "library, this function will always fail, issuing a CPLE_NotSupported\n"
   32611             :     "error.\n"
   32612             :     "\n"
   32613             :     "Parameters:\n"
   32614             :     "-----------\n"
   32615             :     "\n"
   32616             :     "hThis:  the geometry.\n"
   32617             :     "\n"
   32618             :     "dTolerance:  the distance tolerance for the simplification.\n"
   32619             :     "\n"
   32620             :     "the simplified geometry or NULL if an error occurs.\n"
   32621             :     "\n"
   32622             :     "OGR 1.9.0 \n"
   32623             :     ""},
   32624             :    { (char *)"Geometry_DelaunayTriangulation", (PyCFunction) _wrap_Geometry_DelaunayTriangulation, METH_VARARGS | METH_KEYWORDS, (char *)"\n"
   32625             :     "Geometry_DelaunayTriangulation(Geometry self, double dfTolerance=0.0, int bOnlyEdges=False) -> Geometry\n"
   32626             :     "\n"
   32627             :     "OGRGeometryH\n"
   32628             :     "OGR_G_DelaunayTriangulation(OGRGeometryH hThis, double dfTolerance,\n"
   32629             :     "int bOnlyEdges)\n"
   32630             :     "\n"
   32631             :     "Return a Delaunay triangulation of the vertices of the geometry.\n"
   32632             :     "\n"
   32633             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method\n"
   32634             :     "OGRGeometry::DelaunayTriangulation().\n"
   32635             :     "\n"
   32636             :     "This function is built on the GEOS library, v3.4 or above. If OGR is\n"
   32637             :     "built without the GEOS library, this function will always fail,\n"
   32638             :     "issuing a CPLE_NotSupported error.\n"
   32639             :     "\n"
   32640             :     "Parameters:\n"
   32641             :     "-----------\n"
   32642             :     "\n"
   32643             :     "hThis:  the geometry.\n"
   32644             :     "\n"
   32645             :     "dfTolerance:  optional snapping tolerance to use for improved\n"
   32646             :     "robustness\n"
   32647             :     "\n"
   32648             :     "bOnlyEdges:  if TRUE, will return a MULTILINESTRING, otherwise it will\n"
   32649             :     "return a GEOMETRYCOLLECTION containing triangular POLYGONs.\n"
   32650             :     "\n"
   32651             :     "the geometry resulting from the Delaunay triangulation or NULL if an\n"
   32652             :     "error occurs.\n"
   32653             :     "\n"
   32654             :     "OGR 2.1 \n"
   32655             :     ""},
   32656             :    { (char *)"Geometry_Polygonize", _wrap_Geometry_Polygonize, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   32657             :     "Geometry_Polygonize(Geometry self) -> Geometry\n"
   32658             :     "\n"
   32659             :     "OGRGeometryH\n"
   32660             :     "OGR_G_Polygonize(OGRGeometryH hTarget)\n"
   32661             :     "\n"
   32662             :     "Polygonizes a set of sparse edges.\n"
   32663             :     "\n"
   32664             :     "A new geometry object is created and returned containing a collection\n"
   32665             :     "of reassembled Polygons: NULL will be returned if the input collection\n"
   32666             :     "doesn't corresponds to a MultiLinestring, or when reassembling Edges\n"
   32667             :     "into Polygons is impossible due to topological inconsistencies.\n"
   32668             :     "\n"
   32669             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method OGRGeometry::Polygonize().\n"
   32670             :     "\n"
   32671             :     "This function is built on the GEOS library, check it for the\n"
   32672             :     "definition of the geometry operation. If OGR is built without the GEOS\n"
   32673             :     "library, this function will always fail, issuing a CPLE_NotSupported\n"
   32674             :     "error.\n"
   32675             :     "\n"
   32676             :     "Parameters:\n"
   32677             :     "-----------\n"
   32678             :     "\n"
   32679             :     "hTarget:  The Geometry to be polygonized.\n"
   32680             :     "\n"
   32681             :     "a handle to a newly allocated geometry now owned by the caller, or\n"
   32682             :     "NULL on failure.\n"
   32683             :     "\n"
   32684             :     "OGR 1.9.0 \n"
   32685             :     ""},
   32686             :    { (char *)"Geometry_Boundary", _wrap_Geometry_Boundary, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   32687             :     "Geometry_Boundary(Geometry self) -> Geometry\n"
   32688             :     "\n"
   32689             :     "OGRGeometryH\n"
   32690             :     "OGR_G_Boundary(OGRGeometryH hTarget)\n"
   32691             :     "\n"
   32692             :     "Compute boundary.\n"
   32693             :     "\n"
   32694             :     "A new geometry object is created and returned containing the boundary\n"
   32695             :     "of the geometry on which the method is invoked.\n"
   32696             :     "\n"
   32697             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method OGR_G_Boundary().\n"
   32698             :     "\n"
   32699             :     "This function is built on the GEOS library, check it for the\n"
   32700             :     "definition of the geometry operation. If OGR is built without the GEOS\n"
   32701             :     "library, this function will always fail, issuing a CPLE_NotSupported\n"
   32702             :     "error.\n"
   32703             :     "\n"
   32704             :     "Parameters:\n"
   32705             :     "-----------\n"
   32706             :     "\n"
   32707             :     "hTarget:  The Geometry to calculate the boundary of.\n"
   32708             :     "\n"
   32709             :     "a handle to a newly allocated geometry now owned by the caller, or\n"
   32710             :     "NULL on failure.\n"
   32711             :     "\n"
   32712             :     "OGR 1.8.0 \n"
   32713             :     ""},
   32714             :    { (char *)"Geometry_GetBoundary", _wrap_Geometry_GetBoundary, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   32715             :     "Geometry_GetBoundary(Geometry self) -> Geometry\n"
   32716             :     "\n"
   32717             :     "OGRGeometryH\n"
   32718             :     "OGR_G_GetBoundary(OGRGeometryH hTarget)\n"
   32719             :     "\n"
   32720             :     "Compute boundary (deprecated)\n"
   32721             :     "\n"
   32722             :     "Deprecated\n"
   32723             :     "\n"
   32724             :     "See:   OGR_G_Boundary() \n"
   32725             :     ""},
   32726             :    { (char *)"Geometry_ConvexHull", _wrap_Geometry_ConvexHull, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   32727             :     "Geometry_ConvexHull(Geometry self) -> Geometry\n"
   32728             :     "\n"
   32729             :     "OGRGeometryH\n"
   32730             :     "OGR_G_ConvexHull(OGRGeometryH hTarget)\n"
   32731             :     "\n"
   32732             :     "Compute convex hull.\n"
   32733             :     "\n"
   32734             :     "A new geometry object is created and returned containing the convex\n"
   32735             :     "hull of the geometry on which the method is invoked.\n"
   32736             :     "\n"
   32737             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method OGRGeometry::ConvexHull().\n"
   32738             :     "\n"
   32739             :     "This function is built on the GEOS library, check it for the\n"
   32740             :     "definition of the geometry operation. If OGR is built without the GEOS\n"
   32741             :     "library, this function will always fail, issuing a CPLE_NotSupported\n"
   32742             :     "error.\n"
   32743             :     "\n"
   32744             :     "Parameters:\n"
   32745             :     "-----------\n"
   32746             :     "\n"
   32747             :     "hTarget:  The Geometry to calculate the convex hull of.\n"
   32748             :     "\n"
   32749             :     "a handle to a newly allocated geometry now owned by the caller, or\n"
   32750             :     "NULL on failure. \n"
   32751             :     ""},
   32752             :    { (char *)"Geometry_MakeValid", _wrap_Geometry_MakeValid, METH_VARARGS, (char *)"\n"
   32753             :     "Geometry_MakeValid(Geometry self) -> Geometry\n"
   32754             :     "\n"
   32755             :     "OGRGeometryH\n"
   32756             :     "OGR_G_MakeValid(OGRGeometryH hGeom)\n"
   32757             :     "\n"
   32758             :     "Attempts to make an invalid geometry valid without losing vertices.\n"
   32759             :     "\n"
   32760             :     "Already-valid geometries are cloned without further intervention.\n"
   32761             :     "\n"
   32762             :     "This function is the same as the C++ method OGRGeometry::MakeValid().\n"
   32763             :     "\n"
   32764             :     "This function is built on the GEOS >= 3.8 library, check it for the\n"
   32765             :     "definition of the geometry operation. If OGR is built without the GEOS\n"
   32766             :     ">= 3.8 library, this function will return a clone of the input\n"
   32767             :     "geometry if it is valid, or NULL if it is invalid\n"
   32768             :     "\n"
   32769             :     "Parameters:\n"
   32770             :     "-----------\n"
   32771             :     "\n"
   32772             :     "hGeom:  The Geometry to make valid.\n"
   32773             :     "\n"
   32774             :     "a newly allocated geometry now owned by the caller, or NULL on\n"
   32775             :     "failure.\n"
   32776             :     "\n"
   32777             :     "GDAL 3.0 \n"
   32778             :     ""},
   32779             :    { (char *)"Geometry_Buffer", (PyCFunction) _wrap_Geometry_Buffer, METH_VARARGS | METH_KEYWORDS, (char *)"\n"
